articles.title: New Microsoft Surface for Business PCs pair Panther Lake chips with as little as 8GB of RAM — 13-inch Surface Laptop goes light on memory but still starts at $1,299
articles.summary: Microsoft has announced the Surface Laptop 8 and Surface Pro 12 for Business, both starting at $1,949 and featuring Intel's Panther Lake silicon. There's also a new Surface Laptop 13-inch that comes with as little as 8GB RAM coming later this year and starting at $1,299.
articles.title_zh: Microsoft 推出商用 Surface 新品搭載 Panther Lake 晶片，最低配置僅 8GB RAM — 13 吋 Surface Laptop 記憶體配置精簡但起價 $1,299
articles.summary_zh: Microsoft 發表商用 Surface Laptop 8 和 Surface Pro 12，均搭載 Intel Panther Lake 晶片，起價 $1,949；另有 13 吋 Surface Laptop 將於年底推出，最低配置 8GB RAM，起價 $1,299。

articles.title: AMD rumored to ready budget-friendly Ryzen 7 7700X3D for suffering gamers — chipmaker lowers clocks and price with new Zen 4 X3D CPU

articles.title_zh: AMD 傳將推出預算友善型 Ryzen 7 7700X3D 滿足玩家需求 — 晶片製造商降低時脈和價格推出新款 Zen 4 X3D CPU
articles.summary_zh: 硬體洩露者聲稱 AMD 正準備推出 Ryzen 7 7700X3D，這是已停產 Ryzen 7 7800X3D 的低階版本，售價更低廉。

articles.title: Scaling Down Is the New Scaling Up

articles.title: Kobo finally copies one of Kindle’s biggest ecosystem advantages
articles.summary: TL;DR Rakuten Kobo announced a new integration with StoryGraph. The feature will support automatic syncing for current reads, reading progress, finished books, and star ratings. The new integration launches in June. Goodreads integration has long been one of Kindle’s understated ecosystem advantages. Kobo users, meanwhile, have mostly been stuck manually updating third-party reading trackers or relying on clunky workarounds. That changes very soon, thanks to Kobo’s newly announced partnership with StoryGraph. Don’t want to miss the best from Android Authority ?
articles.title_zh: Kobo 終於複製 Kindle 的主要生態系優勢之一
articles.summary_zh: Rakuten Kobo 宣布與 StoryGraph 整合，支持自動同步當前閱讀、閱讀進度和評分，將於 6 月推出。

articles.title: Trump Mobile finally has a real phone, but it may also have a real data leak
articles.summary: TL;DR A YouTuber claims the Trump Mobile site is exposing customer information through a basic security exploit. Voidzilla says his mailing address, email, and order details were accessible, but not credit card info. The alleged leak may also suggest Trump Mobile’s real order numbers are far lower than previously reported. The Trump Mobile T1 Phone may finally be moving from punchline to actual product , but apparently, this launch still had room for another clownish twist. After months of delays and general weirdness, the $499 phone has started reaching some media outlets, but a YouTuber claims the Trump Mobile website is leaking customer information. Voidzilla, a YouTuber with 1.55 million subscribers, says in a new video that Trump Mobile’s website is exposing customer data through what
articles.title_zh: Trump Mobile 終於有了真正的手機，但可能也面臨真正的數據洩露
articles.summary_zh: 一位 YouTuber 聲稱 Trump Mobile 網站通過基本安全漏洞洩露客戶信息，包括郵寄地址、電子郵件和訂單詳情。

articles.title: Google caps off I/O 2026 day one with Android 17 QPR1 Beta 3 release
articles.summary: TL;DR Android 17 QPR1 Beta 3 is now available for Pixel testers to install. Today’s release arrives just two weeks after Beta 2. Google says this update includes “a minor SDK release.” Today was a massive one for Google, with the company announcing everything from a new Gemini model to Android XR smart glasses at I/O 2026 . While we got most of our pure-Android news earlier this month at The Android Show I/O Edition , Google loves holding a few surprises for the last moment — and today, that spells Android 17 QPR1 Beta 3 . Don’t want to miss the best from Android Authority ?
articles.title_zh: Google 以 Android 17 QPR1 Beta 3 發佈結束 I/O 2026 第一天

articles.title: You’ll soon be able to point and click your way around Google TV like you’re using a Wiimote
articles.summary: Credit: C. Scott Brown / Android Authority TL;DR The Google TV team plans to update the remote experience for faster navigation. The company will introduce pointer remote support. This feature will allow you to use your TV remote like a mouse. Today is the first day of Google I/O 2026 , and that means we’re getting a flurry of announcements. Although I/O is a conference meant for developers, there’s still plenty of news that relates to the average user. For example, you’ll soon be able to use a pointer remote to move through Google TV in a new way. Don’t want to miss the best from Android Authority ?
articles.title_zh: 您很快就能像使用 Wiimote 一樣指點點擊瀏覽 Google TV
articles.summary_zh: Google TV 團隊計劃更新遙控器體驗，引入指針遙控器支持，讓您能像使用滑鼠一樣使用電視遙控器。

articles.title: Deal: The Garmin Fenix 8 Solar drops just got $350 cheaper
articles.summary: Whether you’re hiking the toughest trails or pushing your limits in the gym, a reliable GPS smartwatch can seriously enhance your outdoor adventures. The Garmin Fenix 8 Solar fits the bill, and it’s now available for $849.99, down from the retail price of $1,049.99.
articles.title_zh: 優惠：Garmin Fenix 8 Solar 便宜了 $350
articles.summary_zh: Garmin Fenix 8 Solar 智能手錶現以 $849.99 的價格提供，較零售價 $1,049.99 下降。

articles.title: The Android XR smart glasses everyone wants won’t debut until next year
articles.summary: TL;DR Samsung and Google showed off a pair of audio-only Android XR glasses at I/O today. While those will launch this fall, full display glasses aren’t due to arrive before the end of 2026. Developers, however, will get access to the tethered XREAL Project Aura later this year. Smart glasses are sure vying hard to be the next big thing. Bulky headsets may get the job done when we’re tethered to our computers, but the most interesting products in development here are also the most versatile — and they’re what Google’s calling “Intelligent Eyewear.” We just got a look during the I/O 2026 keynote at the audio-only models coming later this year from Google, Samsung, and a couple eyewear partners, and now we’ve also got some news to share about what the timetable’s looking like for display gla
articles.title_zh: 人人都想要的 Android XR 智能眼鏡要到明年才推出
articles.summary_zh: Samsung 和 Google 在 I/O 展示的音頻眼鏡將於秋季推出，而全顯示屏眼鏡要到 2026 年年底才問世。

articles.title: LIFX Smart Light Bulbs at a record 36% off are a solid pick
articles.summary: Lighting can really change the mood of your space, and smart lights take it to another level. The LIFX Smart Light Bulbs A19 E26 are currently available for $31.99, which is 32% off their retail price of $49.99. This brings them to a fresh deal worth considering.
articles.title_zh: LIFX 智能燈泡以創紀錄的 36% 折扣是不錯的選擇
articles.summary_zh: LIFX Smart Light Bulbs A19 E26 目前售價 $31.99，較零售價 $49.99 下降 32%。

articles.title: Gemini’s new Canva integration turns AI creations into fully editable designs
articles.summary: Credit: Canva TL;DR Google has expanded Gemini’s connected app ecosystem with Canva integration. Designs created in the Gemini chat are now fully editable inside the Canva Editor. Magic Layers can now turn an AI-generated image into a fully editable design asset. From the launch of Gemini 3.5 Flash to the announcement of “ Universal Cart ,” it’s been a busy day of announcements for the start of Google I/O 2026. Not to be missed, Google also announced that it is expanding Gemini’s connected app ecosystem through new integrations. One of the new integrations includes the design platform Canva. Don’t want to miss the best from Android Authority ?
articles.title_zh: Gemini 的新 Canva 整合將 AI 創作轉變為完全可編輯的設計
articles.summary_zh: Google 擴展了 Gemini 的連接應用生態系統，加入 Canva 整合，在 Gemini 中創建的設計現在可在 Canva Editor 中完全編輯。

articles.title: Google Search on Android now lets you ask AI about any link you open
articles.summary: Credit: Joe Maring / Android Authority TL;DR Google is adding a new “Ask” button to web search results on its Android app. The button basically opens AI Mode with the webpage added as context, so you can ask specific questions. Along with this, Google is also testing attachment options for Files and Drive in AI Mode. Have you ever tapped a link from Google Search results, and then immediately encountered something else you wanted to search for? Unless you use Chrome (or another Android web browser) to open Google search results in new tabs, you’d know how jarring it is when you hastily open another search sequence and basically end up overwriting the previous search. Thankfully, Google is finally looking to solve that issue with a new feature. In addition to the new Search experience super
articles.title_zh: Android 上的 Google Search 現在讓您詢問 AI 任何打開的連結
articles.summary_zh: Google 在 Android 應用中新增「Ask」按鈕，可用 AI Mode 並將網頁作為上下文提出問題。

articles.title: Wear OS 7 announced: A more efficient and intelligent smartwatch platform
articles.summary: Credit: Android Developers Blog TL;DR Google has revealed Wear OS 7, the latest version of its smartwatch platform. The company says watches upgrading to Wear OS 7 could see up to 10% better battery life. Google adds that some watches launching later this year will also get Gemini Intelligence. Google has already made plenty of announcements at its I/O developer conference, but the company still had a major surprise as it just revealed Wear OS 7 for smartwatches . Google promises that Wear OS 7 is smarter and more efficient than its predecessor. In fact, the company says users upgrading their watches from Wear OS 6 to Wear OS 7 could see a 10% improvement in battery life.
articles.title_zh: Wear OS 7 宣布推出：更高效且更智能的智能手錶平台
articles.summary_zh: Google 推出 Wear OS 7，搭載設備可提升 10% 電池續航力，部分手錶將獲得 Gemini Intelligence。

articles.title: Will One UI 9 beta break your Good Lock setup? Samsung reveals compatibility list
articles.summary: Credit: Ryan Haines / Android Authority TL;DR Samsung has revealed which Good Lock modules work with One UI 9. Some of the compatible modules include Dropship, Nice Shot, Edge Touch, Theme Park, and Keys Cafe. Some that are still in development include NavStar, LockStar, and QuickStar. Samsung recently began rolling out the beta for One UI 9 to the Galaxy S26. As with any major update, installing One UI 9 will mean you’ll lose access to some Good Lock modules, as some are not yet compatible with the latest version of the OS. If you want to know which Good Lock apps currently work on One UI 9 before updating, Samsung has now shared a list. Don’t want to miss the best from Android Authority ?
articles.title_zh: One UI 9 beta 會破壞您的 Good Lock 設置嗎？Samsung 公佈相容性列表
articles.summary_zh: Samsung 公佈了與 One UI 9 相容的 Good Lock 模組列表，包括 Dropship、Nice Shot 和 Edge Touch 等。

articles.title: Google turns Gemini into a proactive AI agent with Spark, Daily Brief, and a major redesign
articles.summary: Credit: Adamya Sharma / Android Authority TL;DR Google is rolling out a redesigned Gemini app with its new “Neural Expressive” design language, richer responses, improved Gemini Live conversations, and support across Android, iOS, and the web. The company also announced new AI agents called Daily Brief and Gemini Spark, with Spark designed to proactively handle tasks across Gmail, Docs, and other connected apps. Gemini Omni is also coming to the Gemini app as a new multimodal model that can generate and edit cinematic videos from text, images, and clips. Google just announced one of the biggest overhauls to the Gemini app yet at Google I/O 2026, introducing a redesigned interface, proactive AI agents, and a powerful new video generation model called Gemini Omni.
articles.title_zh: Google 通過 Spark、Daily Brief 和重大重新設計將 Gemini 轉變為主動式 AI 代理
articles.summary_zh: Google 推出重新設計的 Gemini 應用，採用「Neural Expressive」設計語言，並推出 Daily Brief 和 Spark 等新 AI 代理。

articles.title: Gemini 3.5 Flash is here: Google’s smartest speed model promises better coding and agents
articles.summary: TL;DR At Google I/O 2026, Google has introduced the Gemini 3.5 family of AI models, starting with Gemini 3.5 Flash. Gemini 3.5 Flash is said to be four times faster than competing frontier models and outperforms Gemini 3.1 Pro on coding and agentic benchmarks. Gemini 3.5 Flash is rolling out globally as the default model for billions of users in the Gemini app and Google Search. Gemini is one of the best AI models around, with each release being widely applauded for pushing the envelope of what end users can achieve with AI. Google released Gemini 3 in November 2025, followed by Gemini 3.1 in February 2026. Today at Google I/O 2026, Google is releasing Gemini 3.5 to the world, starting with Gemini 3.5 Flash, which is already rolling out to billions of users globally.
articles.title_zh: Gemini 3.5 Flash 發佈：Google 最快速的智能模型承諾更好的代碼編寫和代理功能
articles.summary_zh: Google 在 I/O 2026 推出 Gemini 3.5 Flash，速度快 4 倍，在編碼和代理基準測試中超越 Gemini 3.1 Pro。

articles.title: Project Genie now lets you reimagine your favorite real-world spots with a creative twist
articles.summary: TL;DR Google has updated its experimental Project Genie AI model to incorporate real-world imagery from Google Maps’ Street View, allowing users to navigate, style, and interact with actual US locations. Beyond creative exploration, the update provides a virtual environment based on real-world data to help AI agents and robots learn to navigate complex physical spaces. Google is also expanding access to Project Genie, including the new Street View capabilities, beyond the US to eligible Google AI Ultra $200 subscribers worldwide who are 18 or older. Earlier this year, Google launched Project Genie , an AI model capable of generating diverse, interactive world environments from user prompts. Users can let their imagination go wild with the prompts, but if you want something a bit more groun
articles.title_zh: Project Genie 現在讓您以創意方式重新想像您喜愛的真實地點
articles.summary_zh: Google 更新了 Project Genie，融合 Google Maps Street View 的真實影像，允許用戶瀏覽、改變風格並互動真實美國地點。

articles.title: Google announces Gemini Spark to quietly run your digital life for you
articles.summary: Credit: Joe Maring / Android Authority TL;DR Google has announced Gemini Spark, a new cloud-based AI agent that can proactively complete tasks across various apps like Gmail, Docs, Slides, and more. Spark can monitor emails, organize notes, create summaries, and lots more. Google says Spark will eventually be able to create custom sub-agents, shop on your behalf, and have deeper integrations with services like OpenTable, Instacart, and Chrome. Google just revealed a major redesign for the Gemini app as well as ambitious new features that take the chatbot well beyond its current capabilities. One of those new features is a powerful new AI agent called Gemini Spark.
articles.title_zh: Google 宣布 Gemini Spark 為您的數位生活安靜運行
articles.summary_zh: Google 宣布 Gemini Spark，一個基於雲端的 AI 代理，能跨 Gmail、Docs、Slides 等應用主動完成任務。

articles.title: Google is plugging the Play Store into Gemini for smarter app recommendations
articles.summary: TL;DR Gemini is getting some robust Play Store integration, starting with finding the perfect apps for whatever you describe. Access gets started in just a few weeks, across Gemini in Android, Gemini Live, and Gemini on the web. Later this year, Gemini’s Play Store recommendations will expand to support media, including streaming. Google’s Play Store has a few important jobs, and maybe second only to being a one-stop repository for downloading apps and accessing updates , the Play Store exists to facilitate app discovery . Whether you’re browsing categories or searching for the specific type of app you need, Google’s endeavored to give the Play Store the tools you need to find just the right piece of software. But now Google is giving app discovery a big new AI-powered upgrade, as app reco
articles.title_zh: Google 將 Play Store 插入 Gemini 以獲得更智能的應用推薦
articles.summary_zh: Gemini 獲得 Play Store 整合，讓用戶可根據描述找到完美應用，數週內在 Android、Gemini Live 和網頁版推出。

articles.title: Google is bringing Android’s gaming Sidekick to more users
articles.summary: Credit: Edgar Cervantes / Android Authority TL;DR Google has announced that its Play Games Sidekick overlay will soon expand globally. It will also show you which friends are playing the same game and let you track their achievements. This menu overlay offers shortcuts for screenshots/recording, while also letting you view achievements and AI-based tips. Many Android phones offer a gaming overlay, which lets you view and tweak settings during a gaming session. However, Google introduced its own Play Games Sidekick overlay last year, bringing AI-generated gaming tips and more. Now, the company is expanding this menu. Don’t want to miss the best from Android Authority ?
articles.title_zh: Google 將 Android 遊戲 Sidekick 擴展給更多用戶
articles.summary_zh: Google 宣布 Play Games Sidekick 浮窗將全球擴展，顯示朋友遊玩的遊戲和成就追蹤。

articles.title: Gmail’s fancy AI Inbox is coming to more users, but you’ve still got to pay up
articles.summary: Credit: Edgar Cervantes / Android Authority TL;DR Google has announced new features coming to its AI overview-style summary in Gmail. The feature, called AI Inbox, is getting improved action controls, better file access, and support for personalized responses. AI Inbox, previously limited to Google AI Ultra subscribers, will now also be available to AI Pro and AI Plus users. Since the beginning of the year, Google has been toiling hard to make our Gmail inboxes clutter-free. Back in January, it first previewed “ AI Inbox ,” which, just like its non-AI namesake, is designed to help you master your inbox without missing any key conversations, even though the focus has now shifted from “zero inbox” to focusing on what matters. Over the past months, AI Inbox was released to the highest-paying
articles.title_zh: Gmail 的花俏 AI Inbox 推向更多用戶，但您仍需付費
articles.summary_zh: Google 宣布 AI Inbox 的新功能，包括改進的操作控制、更好的文件訪問和個性化回應支持。

articles.title: Google’s AI Pro subscription just became a lot more tempting with a new YouTube Premium perk
articles.summary: Credit: Joe Maring / Android Authority TL;DR Google’s AI Pro subscription now includes YouTube Premium Lite at no extra cost. YouTube Premium Lite normally costs $8.99/month and offers ad-free viewing, background play, and downloads. The added perk makes Google AI Pro an even more attractive subscription bundle at $19.99/month. The Google AI Pro subscription just became a much sweeter deal at $19.99 per month. Amid all the new Gemini announcements at I/O 2026, Google also slipped in a nice surprise by announcing that the AI Pro plan will now include YouTube Premium Lite at no extra cost.
articles.title_zh: Google 的 AI Pro 訂閱變得更有吸引力，新增 YouTube Premium 福利
articles.summary_zh: Google AI Pro 訂閱現包含 YouTube Premium Lite（通常 $8.99/月），提供無廣告觀看和後台播放。

articles.title: Google Search’s latest smart upgrades can be on the lookout for news before it breaks
articles.summary: TL;DR Google’s upgrading Search with the capabilities of Gemini 3.5 Flash. Search agents will let you watch for news on particular topics, or even track price changes. Agentic coding can turn your Search results into an interactive mini app. Google embracing AI in Search has led to a subtle, but incredibly important shift in how we get responses to our queries, pivoting from examples to actual answers. The quality of those answers is getting better all the time, not just in terms of accuracy and completeness, but also in their scope, incorporating rich new ways of communicating information. This year at I/O 2026 , Google is sharing its latest big advancements for Search, including programmable information agents and access to agentic coding. Don’t want to miss the best from Android Authori
articles.title_zh: Google Search 最新的智能升級可以在新聞爆發前監控
articles.summary_zh: Google 用 Gemini 3.5 Flash 升級 Search，搜尋代理可監控特定主題的新聞並追蹤價格變化。

articles.title: Google is giving Gemini far more control over your Mac than before
articles.summary: TL;DR Google introduced Gemini Spark at Google I/O 2026 as a new AI agent for the Google Gemini on macOS. Gemini Spark can use context from connected apps, conversations, browsing activity, and scheduled tasks to proactively manage emails, documents, and multi-step workflows. Google is also bringing smarter voice features to the macOS Gemini app, allowing users to speak naturally while Gemini automatically cleans up messy phrasing into polished drafts and actionable requests. Google only recently brought a dedicated Google Gemini app to macOS , finally giving Mac users a way to access Gemini without relying entirely on the browser. Now, at Google I/O 2026, the company is already taking things a step further with a new AI agent called Gemini Spark . Gemini Spark will work like a full deskto
articles.title_zh: Google 給予 Gemini 比以往更多對您 Mac 的控制
articles.summary_zh: Google 推出 Gemini Spark for macOS，新 AI 代理可利用連接應用、對話和瀏覽活動的上下文主動管理電子郵件和文檔。

articles.title: Google’s newest Gemini Omni model can turn real videos into surreal fever dreams
articles.summary: TL;DR Google is introducing Gemini Omni, a new multimodal model to generate videos. Omni builds upon Veo and creates videos using text, audio, stills, and even actual videos. In addition to the Gemini app, Omni will be available through Flow for paying Gemini users. You can also use it for free to create Remixes using YouTube Shorts. Video generation has been one of the most compelling creative uses of AI. Among the platforms that have helped fuel the phenomenon is Google’s Veo , especially Gen 3, which has proven incredibly powerful at creating entire scenes with consistent elements and nearly perfect lip-syncs. While Veo 3 (and newer 3.1) has been limited to creating purely AI-generated videos with text and audio, Google is introducing a new model at Google I/O 2026 that goes a step furt
articles.title_zh: Google 最新的 Gemini Omni 模型可以將真實視頻轉變成超現實的夢幻景象
articles.summary_zh: Google 推出新的多模態模型 Gemini Omni，可以使用文本、音頻、靜止圖像甚至實際視頻生成視頻。該模型將通過 Gemini 應用和 Flow 向付費用戶提供。

articles.title: Google is transforming your online shopping cart into something much smarter
articles.summary: Credit: Google TL;DR Google is introducing a new shopping feature called “Universal Cart.” This feature is an intelligent cart and agentic hub that works across merchants and services, allowing you to add shopping items as you browse Search, chat with Gemini, read Gmail, and more. Universal Cart is rolling out to Search and the Gemini app in the US this summer, with YouTube and Gmail to follow. Earlier this year, Google unveiled Universal Commerce Protocol (UCP) , a new common language for AI agents to make autonomous shopping part of the buying experience. The company also recently introduced a new payments infrastructure to make agentic checkouts more seamless. Despite concerns brought up by US lawmakers , Google is now tying this all together by introducing a new shopping feature. Don’t
articles.title_zh: Google 正在將您的在線購物車轉變成更智能的工具
articles.summary_zh: Google 推出了名為「Universal Cart」的新購物功能，這是一個跨商家和服務的智能購物車樞紐，讓用戶在瀏覽 Search、與 Gemini 聊天、閱讀 Gmail 等時添加購物項目。

articles.title: Finding the right Android app just got easier with Google’s new Ask Play upgrade
articles.summary: Credit: Edgar Cervantes / Android Authority TL;DR Google is expanding Ask Play for deeper search journeys. The tool is now available outside of app pages to help with app discovery. Ask Play provides a high-level summary of complex searches and understands context for follow-up questions. Finding an app in the Play Store is easy when you know exactly what you’re looking for. However, it’s a little harder when you only have an idea of what you want. Fortunately, Google is solving this issue by expanding one of the Play Store’s most helpful features. Don’t want to miss the best from Android Authority ?
articles.title_zh: Google 的新 Ask Play 升級使找到合適的 Android 應用變得更容易
articles.summary_zh: Google 正在擴展 Ask Play 工具，使其可在應用頁面外使用，幫助用戶更深入地搜索和發現應用，並提供複雜搜索的高級摘要。

articles.title: Samsung and Google just showed off Android XR smart glasses with Warby Parker and Gentle Monster
articles.summary: TL;DR Samsung and Google have officially previewed their first “Intelligent Eyewear” audio-only glasses created in partnership with Warby Parker and Gentle Monster. The AI glasses will run Android XR with Gemini-powered features like live translation, navigation, and notification summaries. These will be the first true Android XR smart glasses, expanding the platform beyond Samsung’s existing mixed reality headset. Samsung and Google have officially given us our first proper look at upcoming audio-only Android XR smart glasses created in partnership with two major eyewear brands already familiar to anyone following the space: Warby Parker and Gentle Monster. The announcement at Google I/O builds on partnerships Google had already revealed with both brands, but this is the first time Samsun
articles.title_zh: Samsung 和 Google 與 Warby Parker 和 Gentle Monster 一同展示了 Android XR 智能眼鏡
articles.summary_zh: Samsung 和 Google 正式預覽了與 Warby Parker 和 Gentle Monster 合作開發的首款「Intelligent Eyewear」音頻眼鏡，搭載 Android XR 和 Gemini 功能，包括實時翻譯和導航。

articles.title: Google drops its most expensive AI Ultra pricing and adds new, lower tier
articles.summary: TL;DR Google is adding a fourth AI subscription tier, with a new, lower-priced Ultra option The basic AI Ultra will be available for just $100/month. Google’s keeping its higher-end Ultra tier, but lowering pricing to $200/month, down from $250. You’ve got no shortage of free options for experimenting with AI, but getting access to the best, latest features or overcoming usage limits often requires the use of a premium, paid plan. Google’s already had three offerings like that, between AI Plus for just about $8/month, AI Pro for $20/month, or the top-tier AI Ultra at $250/month. If you needed more access than Pro afforded, but weren’t quite willing to pay for Ultra, Google has some good news to share at I/O this year, as it overhauls its approach to Ultra pricing. Don’t want to miss the be
articles.title_zh: Google 降低最昂貴的 AI Ultra 定價並增加新的低價層級
articles.summary_zh: Google 新增第四個 AI 訂閱層級，推出定價 $100/月的基礎 AI Ultra 選項，同時將高端 Ultra 層級從 $250/月降至 $200/月。

articles.title: Google Pics takes on Canva with easy image generation, intuitive editing
articles.summary: TL;DR Google has revealed Google Pics, an AI image generation and design app for Workspace users. This web app lets you easily generate and edit images such as event invites and other designs. Google Pics is now available to a limited group of testers, but will come to AI Pro subscribers later this summer. Whether you like it or not, image generators are growing in popularity as people use them for invite images, event posters, and more. Gemini is a popular choice in this regard, but Google has now launched a brand-new app for Workspace users. Say hello to Google Pics, which looks like a rival to services like Canva. Google Pics, not to be confused with Google Photos , is an AI image generation and design app that lets you synthesize images and designs that can be easily edited. The compan
articles.title_zh: Google Pics 以易於生成和直觀編輯功能與 Canva 競爭
articles.summary_zh: Google 推出了針對 Workspace 用戶的 AI 圖像生成和設計應用 Google Pics，允許用戶輕鬆生成和編輯圖像，目前僅向有限測試用戶開放。

articles.title: Your favorite Google apps are getting a massive Gemini Live-like upgrade
articles.summary: TL;DR Google has announced new intelligent AI voice integrations for Gmail, Google Keep, and Google Docs during Google I/O 2026. The integrations allow users to ask complex questions, organize messy notes, and build documents completely hands-free. The upgrades will roll out this summer for premium Google AI subscribers and Google Workspace business users. Google’s Android Show: I/O Edition was its Android-focused announcement event , a great idea since the main Google I/O 2026 has been all about AI across Google’s vast portfolio of services. Today, at Google I/O 2026, Google is announcing new intelligent voice capabilities in your favorite Google apps to help you get things done at the speed of your voice. Don’t want to miss the best from Android Authority ?
articles.title_zh: 您最喜愛的 Google 應用正在獲得大規模 Gemini Live 風格的升級
articles.summary_zh: Google 在 Google I/O 2026 期間為 Gmail、Google Keep 和 Google Docs 推出了新的智能 AI 語音集成，讓用戶可以完全免提地提出複雜問題和構建文檔。

articles.title: YouTube is the latest site to stuff AI into its search bar
articles.summary: Credit: Joe Maring / Android Authority TL;DR YouTube is bringing AI to the search bar with the new “Ask YouTube” feature. Ask YouTube will allow you to search for and discover videos with more complex search queries. The feature is available to Premium users in the US who are 18 and up, but it will roll out broadly this summer. Amazon recently announced that Alexa Plus was coming to the search bar of its retail website. Something similar is about to happen to YouTube. Gemini is getting shoved into the search bar of the platform to help you search for and discover videos. Don’t want to miss the best from Android Authority ?
articles.title_zh: YouTube 是最新一個在搜索欄中加入 AI 功能的網站
articles.summary_zh: YouTube 推出「Ask YouTube」功能，將 AI 引入搜索欄，允許用戶使用更複雜的查詢來搜索和發現視頻，目前向美國 18 歲以上的 Premium 用戶開放。

articles.title: Android Halo is Google’s new way to keep AI agents from feeling sneaky
articles.summary: Credit: Google TL;DR Google has announced “Android Halo,” a new system that shows live AI agent activity at the top of your screen. Halo will let users track what Gemini Spark and other supported agents are doing without interrupting their current task. The feature builds on Android’s upcoming Privacy Dashboard upgrades focused on AI transparency and activity tracking. Google has announced a new Android feature called “Android Halo” that’s designed to make AI agents a little less mysterious on your phone.
articles.title_zh: Android Halo 是 Google 防止 AI 代理顯得狡詐的新方式
articles.summary_zh: Google 宣布推出「Android Halo」系統，在屏幕頂部顯示實時 AI 代理活動，讓用戶可以追蹤 Gemini Spark 和其他支持的代理的操作。

articles.title: New day, new Xperia 1 VIII controversy: How thick is it, really?
articles.summary: TL;DR Sony’s claim that the Xperia 1 VIII is 8.3mm thick is reportedly incorrect. Sources say the phone measures 8.59mm thick in real life. It is possible that Sony measured the frame’s thickness and didn’t take into account the raised glass front and back. It’s been almost a week since the Xperia 1 VIII launched, and the phone has already faced an AI camera controversy that just got worse with Sony’s response . It doesn’t seem like the company can catch a break, because yet another controversial problem has emerged — this time from the phone’s spec sheet. Don’t want to miss the best from Android Authority ?
articles.title_zh: 新的一天，新的 Xperia 1 VIII 爭議：它的厚度到底有多少？

articles.title: Find Hub is finally getting one of the handiest Google Maps location features
articles.summary: Credit: Adamya Sharma / Android Authority TL;DR Google is rolling out location notifications in the Find Hub app for Android. You can get alerts when someone sharing their location arrives at or leaves a chosen place. The feature already exists in Google Maps, but it fixes a notable gap in Find Hub. Google’s Find Hub has been steadily growing beyond the basic phone-finding brief, but it has still felt a bit odd that one of Google Maps’ more useful people-tracking features was missing. That gap appears to be closing as Google is rolling out location notifications in the Find Hub app for Android. We spotted the feature working in the latest version of Find Hub on Android. When someone is already sharing their location with you, Find Hub can now notify you when they arrive at or leave a speci
articles.title_zh: Find Hub 終於獲得了 Google Maps 的便利位置功能之一
articles.summary_zh: Google 在 Find Hub 應用中推出位置通知功能，用戶可在有人分享的位置到達或離開指定地點時獲得警報，該功能已在 Google Maps 中存在。

articles.title: Google reinvents the search bar for the AI era
articles.summary: Today at its I/O conference Google has announced the biggest upgrade to the search box in over 25 years. And yes, of course - it's AI-powered now, what were you expecting? One year after its debut AI Mode has over one billion monthly users, and now Google Search is upgraded with the Gemini 3.5 Flash model, also just announced at I/O. It's the new default model for everyone globally. To complement its arrival, Google has reimagined the search box with AI. The company says "it's more intuitive than ever, dynamically expanding to give you space to describe exactly what you...
articles.title_zh: Google 為 AI 時代重新發明搜索欄

articles.title: Xiaomi 17T series is officially coming to India
articles.summary: Yesterday, Xiaomi officially announced the launch date for the 17T and 17T Pro: May 28. Today, the company's arm in India has started teasing the fact that the series will also be available in that market. That's interesting since it's been years since a T series Xiaomi device was officially launched in India. But at least one of these two will. Xiaomi hasn't confirmed whether both the 17T and the 17T Pro will be offered in the country, and there's plenty of speculation online saying that only the cheaper model will make the cut. Capture moments the way they’re meant to be seen. Closer,...

articles.title: Itel A100 Pro goes official with a 6.6-inch display and a 5,000mAh battery
articles.summary: Itel has launched a new budget phone in India under its A100 series, called the Itel A100 Pro. The handset features a 6.6-inch display, a 5,000mAh battery, and an orange color option that bears a striking resemblance to the iPhone 17 Pro. The Itel A100 Pro is powered by the octa-core Unisoc T7100 chipset, paired with 3GB of RAM and 64GB of internal storage. Luckily, the storage can be expanded further via a microSD card. On the front, the device sports a 6.6-inch LCD display with HD+ resolution and a 90Hz refresh rate. The panel features relatively thick bezels and a waterdrop-style...

articles.title: Here's when the RedMagic 11S Pro is launching internationally
articles.summary: Yesterday, RedMagic unveiled the 11S Pro and 11S Pro+ gaming smartphones for the Chinese market, and in light of that you may have been wondering when to expect an international launch. RedMagic is usually quite quick to bring its devices to global markets, and the situation is similar in this case. The brand has just revealed that the global launch will be taking place on May 27 at 8 AM EDT, which is 1 PM in London, 2 PM in Central Europe, 3 PM in Eastern Europe, and 5:30 PM in India. It appears as if only one device is making the international trip. This will be called RedMagic...

Honor allegedly aims for its battery capacity to be 11,000-12,000 mAh, but the exact number hasn't been decided on just yet. The phone will be powered by the upcoming MediaTek Dimensity 8600 SoC. One could say that alongside the Bose QuietComfort 35, which started the trend, Sony's 1000X series has been the most popular option for years. An achievement remarkably maintained even after many others, including Apple, joined the space. Sony's line of wireless over-ear ANC headphones turns 10 (wow), so the Japanese made something special to mark the occasion - meet the Sony 1000x The ColleXion (reads like...

articles.title: Microsoft announced the new Surface Laptop 8 series and Surface Pro
articles.summary: Microsoft updated four of its laptops today - the Surface Pro 13, the Surface Laptop 13-inch, Surface Laptop 13.8-inch and Surface Laptop 15-inch. The new devices run on the recently released Intel Core Ultra Series 3 chips, but Snapdragon X2-powered versions are expected later this year. Surface Laptop Starting with the most important updates - the Surface Laptop 13.8 and 15-inch. OLED...

articles.summary: The Trump Mobile T1 Phone was supposed to launch last year in August, but many future customers who put a $100 pre-sale order were left empty-handed until now. It looks like the T1 Phone is actually happening as the company started distributing units to media, which in turn means that the actual shipments to customers will begin shortly. But there's a catch. If you haven't followed the news around the T1 Phone lately, you will be surprised to see a couple of discrepancies. The most obvious one is the new design, which is a lot different from the initial one. Also, the American flag at...

articles.title: Samsung and Google unveil AI-powered smart glasses at Google I/O 2026
articles.summary: In October last year, Samsung announced that it was developing AI-powered smart glasses in collaboration with Google and eyewear brands Gentle Monster and Warby Parker. Now, at Google I/O 2026, the companies have offered the first official look at the upcoming Android XR running wearable. The AI smart glasses will be available in two distinct designs, one created by Gentle Monster and the other by Warby Parker. While Google and Samsung have yet to reveal detailed hardware specifications, they did highlight several of the key features the glasses will offer. According to Google and...

articles.summary: Google says it's designed the app to be accessible to everyone, from teachers to small business owners.

articles.title: Google’s Genie world model can now simulate real streets with Street View

articles.title: With Gemini 3.5 Flash, Google bets its next AI wave on agents, not chatbots
articles.summary: Google launched Gemini 3.5 Flash, its most powerful coding and agentic AI model yet, at the company's annual developer conference. It is capable of autonomously executing complex tasks and building software from scratch.

articles.summary_zh: Google 在其年度開發者大會上推出了 Gemini 3.5 Flash，這是其迄今為止最強大的編碼和 agentic AI 模型，能夠自主執行複雜任務和從零開始構建軟體。

articles.title: Google Search as you know it is over
articles.summary: Google is transforming Search from a list of links into an AI-powered experience filled with conversational answers, autonomous agents, and interactive interfaces — a shift that could further reduce traffic to publishers across the web.

articles.summary_zh: Google 正在將搜尋從連結列表轉變為 AI 驅動的體驗，充滿對話答案、自主 agents 和互動介面——這一轉變可能會進一步減少對發佈者網站的流量。

articles.title: OpenAI is making it easier to check if an image was made by their models
articles.summary: OpenAI announced two new measures to help detect AI generated imagery: joining the open C2PA standard and adding Google's SynthID to its products.
articles.title_zh: OpenAI 讓檢查圖像是否由其模型生成變得更容易

articles.title: Google’s AI Studio now lets anyone build Android apps in minutes

articles.summary_zh: Google 推出了新的網頁版 AI 工具，可在幾分鐘內生成原生 Android 應用程式，因為公司正在擴大其在 AI 驅動軟體開發中的推進。

articles.title: Agentic app coding gets an upgrade with Google’s release of Android CLI

articles.summary_zh: 大多數人在多個設備、多個零售商和多天內購物，這就是 Google 推出 Universal Cart 的原因。

articles.title: Google introduces Gemini Spark, a 24/7 agentic assistant with Gmail integration, at IO 2026
articles.summary: At the Google I/O developer conference, the company announced a new agentic personal assistant called Gemini Spark, built from Gemini's base models and an agentic harness from Google Antigravity.

articles.title: Google adds voice-based prompting to Docs and Keep

articles.title: Google updates its Gemini app to take on ChatGPT and Claude at IO 2026

articles.title: Google just redesigned the search box for the first time in 25 years — here’s why it matters more than you think.
articles.summary: For a quarter century, the Google search box has been one of the most recognizable interfaces in computing: a thin white rectangle, a blinking cursor, a few typed words, and a list of blue links. On Tuesday, Google will formally retire that paradigm. At its annual I/O developer conference , Google announced a sweeping redesign of the search box itself — the literal text field where billions of queries begin every day — transforming it from a simple keyword input into a dynamic, AI-driven conversation starter that can accept text, images, PDFs, videos, and even open Chrome tabs as inputs. The company is also merging its AI Overviews and AI Mode features into a single, seamless search flow, eliminating the friction that previously forced users to choose between a traditional results page and
articles.title_zh: Google 剛剛在 25 年來首次重新設計搜尋框——以下是為什麼這比你想像的更重要
articles.summary_zh: 四分之一世紀以來，Google 搜尋框一直是計算中最易識別的介面之一：一個薄白色矩形、閃爍的遊標、幾個輸入的字和一個藍色連結列表。週二，Google 將正式淘汰這一範式。

articles.title: Anthropic hires OpenAI co-founder Andrej Karpathy to lead Claude pre-training research
articles.summary: Anthropic scored a major hire today. Former Tesla senior director and OpenAI founding member Andrej Karpathy is joining the organization as a member of the company’s pre-training team. Karpathy posted on X (formerly Twitter) this Tuesday and said, “Personal update: I’ve joined Anthropic. I think the next few years at the frontier of LLMs will be especially formative. I am very excited to join the team here and get back to R&D. I remain deeply passionate about education and plan to resume my work on it in time.” Where has Karpathy worked? After completing his Stanford University Ph.D. in 2016 (studies which he detailed as focused on novel convolutional/recurrent neural networks and their applications in computer vision, natural language processing , and their int
articles.title_zh: Anthropic 聘請 OpenAI 共同創辦人 Andrej Karpathy 領導 Claude 預訓練研究

articles.title: Google now lets you vibe code native Android apps in AI Studio
articles.summary: Apple may not be a fan of vibe coding , but Google is leaning in. On Tuesday, Google announced that anyone can now use Google AI Studio to build native, Kotlin-based Android apps with just a few prompts. To test the result, users can install the app on their device and share it with others for testing, or bring it into Android Studio to refine the details and get it ready for wider distribution. As Google notes in its announcement, AI has made it almost trivial to build web-based applications (though running those in production is another issue). Mobile development, however, has taken something of a back seat as everybody runs their MVPs in the browser on localhost:3001. And while Google already supported Gemini in Android Studio for vibe coding mobile apps (and, starting today, supports v
articles.title_zh: Google 現在讓你在 AI Studio 中直觀編寫原生 Android 應用
articles.summary_zh: Google 宣布任何人現在都可以使用 Google AI Studio，僅需幾個提示詞就能建立原生的 Kotlin 型 Android 應用。使用者可以在設備上安裝測試應用並與他人分享。

articles.title: Google wants to make the web agent-ready
articles.summary: At its I/O developer conference on Tuesday, Google announced a number of new features and specs for how it plans to bring its Chrome browser and the web in general into this new era of agentic AI. As Google developer advocate Paul Kinlan notes in the announcement, “agents are transforming development everywhere, and nowhere is that transformation happening faster than on the web. It’s redefining what we build, how we build, and who builds. As we enter the era of the agentic web, we see a shift that bridges the gap between complex developer workflows, underlying platform capabilities, and everyday user experiences.” Google argues that the web needs to adapt to AI agents’ needs, making it easier for them to interact with websites, while the browser needs to become mor
articles.title_zh: Google 希望讓網路為代理 AI 做好準備
articles.summary_zh: 在 I/O 開發者大會上，Google 宣布了一系列新功能和規範，旨在將其 Chrome 瀏覽器和整個網路帶入代理 AI 新時代。Google 開發者倡導者 Paul Kinlan 指出代理 AI 正在改變開發。

articles.title: Google now lets developers use GPT and Claude in Android Studio
articles.summary: Google is using its annual I/O developers conference to announce quite a few new AI-centric tools for building Android apps. These include the ability to build native apps in its AI Studio prototyping environment, but Android Studio, Google’s dedicated IDE for building these apps, is also getting a number of updates. In addition, the Android CLI is now available as a 1.0 release and can be used from Google’s Antigravity app.  “This flexibility offers developers greater control over performance, privacy, and cost,” Google says in its announcement.  Choose your own model What shows off Google’s current approach to how developers want to build their apps best, though, is maybe the fact that they can now choose either Gemini, GPT from OpenAI, or Claude f
articles.title_zh: Google 現在讓開發者在 Android Studio 中使用 GPT 和 Claude
articles.summary_zh: Google 在年度 I/O 開發者大會上宣布多項新的 AI 中心工具，包括在 AI Studio 原型環境中建立原生應用的功能，以及在 Android Studio IDE 中整合 GPT 和 Claude。

articles.title: Google’s Gemini 3.5 Flash beats the frontier models
articles.summary: At its I/O developer conference, Google on Tuesday unveiled two new AI models: Gemini 3.5 Flash , the newest model in its Gemini series, and Gemini Omni Flash, a new multimodal model that can “create anything from any input,” as Google puts it. Gemini 3.5 Flash Gemini 3.5 Flash is the first model in the Gemini 3.5 series. A Pro version is still in the works and should launch next month, but even 3.5 Flash bests the existing 3.1 Pro model in most benchmarks. In TerminalBench 2.1 , for example, 3.1 Pro currently scores 70.3% when using the Gemini CLI to solve coding problems, while 3.5 Flash scores 76.2%. That’s not quite up there with OpenAI’s GPT 5.5, but for a Flash model, that’s a very solid performance. The new Flash model gets similar results that outperfo
articles.title_zh: Google 的 Gemini 3.5 Flash 超越前沿模型
articles.summary_zh: Google 在 I/O 開發者大會上推出兩個新 AI 模型：Gemini 3.5 Flash 和多模式的 Gemini Omni Flash，後者能夠「從任何輸入創造任何東西」。

articles.title: Google launches $100 AI Ultra plan and cuts top tier to $200
articles.summary: Google on Tuesday launched a new $ 100-per-month AI Ultra plan that sits neatly between its existing $200 and $20 plans, and announced it is switching from prompt limits to a “compute-used” model for metering access to its AI tools. Google also cut the price of its $250 AI Ultra plan to $200 — making it one of the few AI offerings that have recently gotten cheaper. Everybody now has a $100 plan Sometimes it seems like the big frontier AI labs are copying each other, and when it comes to their subscription plans, that’s most definitely the case. All of the major providers (Google, OpenAI and Anthropic) now offer $20/month, $100/month, and $200/month plans. Like OpenAI, Google also offers a more basic $8/month plan (Google AI Plus) Even though many of the core feature
articles.title_zh: Google 推出 $100 AI Ultra 計畫並將頂級服務降至 $200

articles.title: Analog Devices to Acquire Empower in $1.5 Billion Transaction
articles.summary: Analog Devices Inc. agreed to acquire closely held Empower Semiconductor for $1.5 billion in cash as the need skyrockets for efficient chips to power data centers required for artificial intelligence.
articles.title_zh: Analog Devices 以 15 億美元交易收購 Empower
articles.summary_zh: Analog Devices Inc. 同意以 15 億美元現金收購 Empower Semiconductor，以應對 AI 數據中心對高效芯片的迫切需求。

articles.title: Ross Gerber Says AI Efficiency Gains Already 'Amazing'
articles.summary: Gerber Kawasaki Wealth and Investment Management co-founder and CEO Ross Gerber previews Nvidia's first-quarter earnings report and what it might signal for the AI industry on "Bloomberg The Close." (Source: Bloomberg)
articles.title_zh: Ross Gerber 稱 AI 效率收益已經「令人驚嘆」
articles.summary_zh: Gerber Kawasaki Wealth and Investment Management 共同創辦人兼執行長 Ross Gerber 預測 Nvidia 第一季財報並討論其對 AI 產業的影響。

articles.title: College Kids Don't Want Your AI
articles.summary: Students are pushing back against the adoption of AI on campuses, with some organizing protests, petitions, and performance art to express their concerns about the technology's effects on their education and job prospects. Bloomberg’s Victor Swezey has more. (Source: Bloomberg)
articles.title_zh: 大學生不要你的 AI
articles.summary_zh: 學生正在抵抗校園 AI 的採用，有人組織抗議、請願書和行為藝術來表達對該技術對教育和就業前景影響的關切。

articles.title: Hasbro Cancels Dungeons & Dragons Game From ‘Star Wars’ Veteran
articles.summary: Independent studio Giant Skull had announced a deal with Hasbro’s Wizards of the Coast last year.
articles.title_zh: Hasbro 取消《星戰》資深人士的龍與地下城遊戲
articles.summary_zh: 獨立工作室 Giant Skull 去年宣布與 Hasbro 的 Wizards of the Coast 達成協議。

articles.title: JP Morgan’s Global CIO Lori Beer on the Pace of Change in the Tech Space
articles.summary: JP Morgan Global CIO Lori Beer discusses the acceleration of change in the tech space, even in the last year. She discusses the anxiety that can come from the ever-changing landscape, but recognizes that there is a huge demand for it as well. She speaks with Bloomberg Surveillance Host Lisa Abramowicz at the JP Morgan Tech, Media & Communications Conference. (Source: Bloomberg)
articles.title_zh: JP Morgan 全球首席資訊官 Lori Beer 談科技領域的變化步伐
articles.summary_zh: JP Morgan 全球首席資訊官 Lori Beer 討論科技領域變化的加速，包括不斷變化的環境帶來的焦慮，但也認可這方面的巨大需求。

articles.title: Chainalysis CEO Tracks Prediction Market Insider Trading
articles.summary: Jonathan Levin, founder and CEO of Chainalysis, joins Scarlet Fu and Tim Stenovec on "Bloomberg Crypto." Polymarket is partnering with blockchain analytics firm Chainalysis to help police its platform as prediction markets grapple with increased scrutiny over insider trading. (Source: Bloomberg)
articles.title_zh: Chainalysis 首席執行官追蹤預測市場內線交易
articles.summary_zh: Chainalysis 創辦人兼執行長 Jonathan Levin 亮相 Bloomberg Crypto，Polymarket 與 Chainalysis 合作以應對預測市場內線交易審查的增加。

articles.title: How Traders Evaluate the Divergence Between US and Chinese AI Models
articles.summary: On this episode of the Odd Lots podcast, Deutsche Bank's Ozan Tarman and Aditya Singhal join Tracy Alloway and Joe Weisenthal to break down the different areas where the East and West are deploying capital and developing AI technology. (Source: Bloomberg)
articles.title_zh: 交易員如何評估美國和中國 AI 模型的差異
articles.summary_zh: Odd Lots 播客邀請 Deutsche Bank 專家分析東西方在 AI 資本部署和技術開發的不同領域。

articles.title: Stablecoins Allow Global Expansion: Native Markets CEO
articles.summary: Mary-Catherine Lader, co-founder and CEO of Native Markets, joins Scarlet Fu and Tim Stenovec on "Bloomberg Crypto." They discuss Hyperliquid, stablecoin growth, and US legislation. (Source: Bloomberg)
articles.title_zh: 穩定幣允許全球擴張：Native Markets 執行長
articles.summary_zh: Native Markets 共同創辦人兼執行長 Mary-Catherine Lader 亮相 Bloomberg Crypto，討論 Hyperliquid、穩定幣增長和美國立法。

articles.title: Wall Street Watchdogs Pause Some Cyber Exams After Mythos Shock
articles.summary: US regulators are pausing some cyber-related examinations of the largest banks, giving the lenders more breathing room as the firms dig into the risks exposed by Anthropic PBC’s new Mythos AI model.
articles.title_zh: 華爾街監管機構在 Mythos 衝擊後暫停部分網絡考試
articles.summary_zh: 美國監管機構暫停對大型銀行進行的部分網絡相關考試，以便銀行深入研究 Anthropic PBC 新 Mythos AI 模型所暴露的風險。

articles.title: FBI seeks US-wide access to license plate cameras, wants "data in near real time"
articles.summary: The Federal Bureau of Investigation announced plans to buy nationwide access to a network of license plate readers, saying it will award contracts to one or more vendors that can offer "near real time" information from cameras across the US. The proposed contract is for the FBI Directorate of Intelligence. "To evaluate and manage threats to personal safety, property, and law enforcement, the FBI requires professional service firms that can provide License Plate Readers (LPRs) for tracking subjects on roads and highways over the US and its territories," the FBI said in a Request for Proposals (RFP) published on May 14. The FBI said the winning bidder or bidders "must provide law enforcement and/or commercial license plate reader data provided through the Contractor’s existing platform." The
articles.title_zh: FBI 尋求全美車牌攝像機訪問權限，要求「近即時數據」
articles.summary_zh: 聯邦調查局宣布計劃購買全國車牌讀卡器網絡訪問權，向能提供來自全美攝像機「近即時」信息的供應商授予合約。

articles.title: Spider-Noir final trailer gives us a classic villain
articles.summary: Prime Video has released one last trailer for its upcoming live action series, Spider-Noir , starring Nicolas Cage, and once again it's been released in two formats: one in black and white (below) and another in color (above), which the showrunners are calling “True Hue.” Seriously, the more footage we see of this series, the more eager we are to find out if the series lives up to its marketing. And the final trailer—which really plays up the deadpan humor and is set to Amy Winehouse's " Back to Black "—is very promising. As previously reported , Marvel Comics created its “noir” line in 2009, reinterpreting familiar Marvel characters in an alternate universe, usually set during the Great Depression in the US. A version of the Spider-Noir character, voiced by Cage, briefly appeared in the a
articles.title_zh: Spider-Noir 最終預告片呈現經典反派
articles.summary_zh: Prime Video 發布了由 Nicolas Cage 主演的即將推出的真人劇集 Spider-Noir 的最後預告片，提供黑白和彩色兩種版本。

articles.title: "I'll buy 10 of those"—NASA science chief yearns for mass-produced satellites
articles.summary: There are more opportunities to access space than ever, thanks to a bevy of commercial rockets, some with reusable boosters, led by SpaceX's workhorse Falcon 9. So why is NASA launching fewer telescopes and planetary science missions than it did a quarter-century ago? The answer is complex. It is not necessarily the money. The space agency's science budget this year is $7.25 billion, roughly the same as it was in 2000, adjusted for inflation. This is despite attempts by the Trump administration to drastically reduce NASA science funding. In the early months of his tenure, NASA Administrator Jared Isaacman's focus has been on human spaceflight and the Moon. This isn't terribly surprising given NASA's wildly successful Artemis II mission carrying four astronauts around the Moon last month. S
articles.title_zh: 「我會買 10 個」——NASA 科學主管渴望批量生產衛星
articles.summary_zh: 得益於眾多商業火箭（包括 SpaceX 的 Falcon 9），進入太空的機會比以往任何時候都多，但 NASA 推出的望遠鏡和行星科學任務反而減少。

articles.title: Plex's 200% Lifetime Pass price hike tries forcing users to another subscription
articles.summary: As of July 1, at 12:01 am UTC—or June 30 at 8:01 pm ET—people seeking access to Plex's media server features through a one-time purchase will have to pay $750. That’s three times the current price of $250. The new price will not affect current Lifetime Plex Pass holders. A Lifetime Plex Pass allows you to stream from your own Plex Media Server to a device connected to your own network, to stream from the server remotely, and to allow others to stream remotely from your server. Read full article Comments
articles.title_zh: Plex 200% 終身通行證漲價試圖強制用戶使用其他訂閱服務
articles.summary_zh: 自 7 月 1 日起，通過一次性購買獲得 Plex 媒體服務器功能的用戶需支付 750 美元，較現行 250 美元價格上漲三倍。

articles.title: Two AI-based science assistants succeed with drug-retargeting tasks
articles.summary: On Tuesday, Nature released two papers describing AI systems intended to help scientists develop and test hypotheses. One, Google's Co-Scientist, is designed as what they term "scientist in the loop," meaning researchers are regularly applying their judgments to direct the system. The second, from a nonprofit called FutureHouse, goes a step beyond and has trained a system that can evaluate biological data coming from some specific classes of experiments. While Google says its system will also work for physics, both groups exclusively present biological data, and largely straightforward hypotheses—this drug will work for that. So, this is not an attempt to replace either scientists or the scientific process. Instead, it's meant to help with what current AIs are best at: chewing through mass
articles.title_zh: 兩個基於 AI 的科學助手在藥物重新靶向任務中成功
articles.summary_zh: Nature 發布兩篇論文介紹旨在幫助科學家開發和測試假設的 AI 系統，包括 Google 的 Co-Scientist 和其他創新工具。

articles.title: Google's SynthID AI watermarking tech is being adopted by OpenAI, Nvidia, and more
articles.summary: In a few short years, we've gone from easily identifying AI content that featured superfluous fingers to images and videos that look shockingly realistic . How can we know what's real in the age of AI? Google's answer is SynthID, which it first demonstrated three years ago. The company says SynthID has since been used to label 100 billion images and videos, plus 60,000 years' worth of audio. Those numbers are only going up now that SynthID is expanding beyond Google. SynthID is not Google's only AI labeling strategy. It's also committed to the C2PA standard, which tags content with metadata describing how it was created. Google began using C2PA more prominently with its Pixel 10 smartphones. Photos taken with the Pixel 10 include metadata describing how they were processed. If a highly zoo
articles.title_zh: Google 的 SynthID AI 水印技術被 OpenAI、Nvidia 等採用
articles.summary_zh: Google 三年前首次演示的 SynthID 技術正被 OpenAI、Nvidia 等公司採用，用於解決 AI 內容識別問題。

articles.title: In stunning display of stupid, secret CISA credentials found in public GitHub repo
articles.summary: Security researcher Brian Krebs brings us the news that America's Cybersecurity & Infrastructure Agency (CISA) has had a large store of plaintext passwords, SSH private keys, tokens, and "other sensitive CISA assets" exposed in a public GitHub repo since at least November 2025. The now-offline public repo—named, somewhat aspirationally, "Private-CISA"—was brought to Krebs' attention by GitGuardian's Guillaume Valadon , who was alerted to the repo's presence by GitGuardian's public code scans. Krebs says that Valadon approached him after receiving no responses from the Private-CISA repo's owner. In an email to Krebs, Valadon claimed that the repo's commit logs show that GitHub's default protections against committing secrets—protections designed to protect unwitting or unskilled develop
articles.title_zh: 驚人的愚蠢行為——秘密 CISA 憑證在公開 GitHub 倉庫中被發現
articles.summary_zh: 安全研究員 Brian Krebs 報導美國網絡安全與基礎設施機構 CISA 的大量明文密碼、SSH 私鑰和敏感資產自至少 2025 年 11 月起在公開 GitHub 倉庫中遭洩露。

articles.title: RFK Jr. forced to withdraw charter that opened CDC panel to anti-vaccine quacks
articles.summary: A revised charter document for the Centers for Disease Control and Prevention's influential vaccine advisory committee has been withdrawn by the Health Department over an administrative error, according to a notice published in the Federal Register Tuesday . The charter's revisions under anti-vaccine Health Secretary Robert F. Kennedy Jr. would have allowed Kennedy to appoint dubiously qualified anti-vaccine allies to advise the CDC. It also would have directed the CDC panel to focus on alleged vaccine injuries and risks and welcomed fringe groups and anti-vaccine organizations to participate in developing federal vaccine policy. Kennedy's move to reshape the CDC panel—the Advisory Committee on Immunization Practices, or ACIP—came amid Kennedy's many other attempts to undermine it, as well
articles.title_zh: RFK Jr. 被迫撤銷開放疾病控制中心小組予反疫苗分子的憲章
articles.summary_zh: 衛生部因行政錯誤而撤銷修訂後的疾病控制中心疫苗諮詢委員會憲章，該委員會在反疫苗人士領導下進行了修訂。

articles.title: Gemini 3.5 Flash might be fast enough for gen AI to make sense
articles.summary: At last year's I/O event, Google was still talking about the 2.5 branch of Gemini, and what a difference a year makes. We've gone through the 3.0 and 3.1 families since then, and now it's on to version 3.5. Gemini 3.5 Flash is rolling out across a wide range of Google products starting today, and Google again claims this model is even better than its last-gen Pro model. That has been a trend with Google's tick-tock model updates over the past year, but the team says this release is special. Gemini 3.5 Flash supposedly offers frontier-level intelligence while also being efficient enough that it may finally make complex agentic tasks worth doing at scale. Tulsee Doshi, senior director of product management for Gemini, explains that the innovations of Gemini 3.5 Flash are woven through multip
articles.title_zh: Gemini 3.5 Flash 可能足夠快以使生成式 AI 有意義
articles.summary_zh: Google 推出 Gemini 3.5 Flash 版本，較去年 I/O 大會展示的 2.5 版本有重大進展，該版本開始在多項 Google 產品中推出。

articles.title: IBM擴大AI資安工具布局，參與廣泛使用軟體漏洞識別與修補

articles.title: GitHub內部儲存庫遭未授權存取，官方稱客戶資料暫未受影響
articles.summary: GitHub在社群平臺X證實，該公司正在調查內部儲存庫遭未授權存取事件。目前官方尚未公布事件時間、入侵途徑與受影響儲存庫數量，僅表示尚無證據顯示GitHub內部儲存庫以外的客戶資訊受到影響，包括客戶的企業、組織與儲存庫。

articles.title: 知名AI研究人員Andrej Karpathy加入Anthropic
articles.summary:
OpenAI共同創辦人Andrej Karpathy週二（5/19）透過X表示，他已加入Anthropic。由於Karpathy被視為AI領域最具代表性的研究者之一，此舉也被外界視為AI頂尖人才流動的重要指標。
現年39歲的Karpathy在史丹佛大學取得博士學位，師從李飛飛，研究領域涵蓋深度學習、電腦視覺與自然語言處理；曾在Google DeepMind擔任研究實習生，為OpenAI在2015年創立時的11名共同創辦人之一。
articles.title_zh: 著名AI研究員Andrej Karpathy加入Anthropic
articles.summary_zh: OpenAI共同創辦人Andrej Karpathy宣布加入Anthropic，被視為AI領域頂尖人才流動的重要指標。39歲的Karpathy曾在Google DeepMind實習，專長涵蓋深度學習、電腦視覺與自然語言處理。

articles.title: Google、黑石合資成立AI基礎架構公司，跨入運算雲服務
articles.summary: Google和另類資產管理公司黑石（Blackstone）今日宣佈將合資成立AI基礎架構公司，結合雙方的資料中心、網路及TPU及軟體，提供客戶執行AI的運算容量及基礎架構。外界認為將衝撃CoreWeave及Nebius等新興運算雲業者。

articles.title: Meta MBBRC首度登臺！祭30萬美元獎金鎖定AI代理等安全
articles.summary: Meta近日於臺北舉辦年度Bug Bounty研究者大會（meta bug bounty researcher conference，MBBRC），該場活動首度移師臺灣，於5月6日到5月9日舉行。本屆大會匯集來自26國、80多位全球頂尖資安研究人員，其中包含10位臺灣研究人員，共同進行為期數日的技術研討與漏洞挖掘，參與者若發現漏洞，最遲須在5月29日前提交。Meta現場也祭出重金，針對活動期間發現的漏洞，提供最高30萬美元的獎金。
articles.title_zh: Meta MBBRC首度登臺！祭30萬美元獎金鎖定AI代理等安全

articles.title: Google搜尋25年大改版，整合AI打造智慧搜尋框
articles.summary:
Google週二（5/19）於Google I/O 2026大會宣布，全面升級Google搜尋體驗，推出25年來最大規模的搜尋框（Search Box）改版，將AI直接整合至搜尋入口，並加入AI代理人（Agents）能力。
新版智慧搜尋框為此次搜尋入口的核心改版功能，它不再只是可輸入關鍵字的欄位，而是能讓使用者直接描述完整需求。它會動態擴大輸入區域，並透過AI理解使用者意圖，協助組織問題；除了文字外，並支援圖片、影片、檔案與Chrome分頁作為搜尋輸入來源。

articles.title: Google公布Gemini 3.5 Flash推理模型，主打代理人開發作業
articles.summary:
在週二舉行Google I/O 2026大會上，Google宣布Gemini 3.5 Flash模型全面上線，主打能讓企業及開發商開發強大代理人，並試圖挑戰OpenAI GPT 5.5及Anthropic Claude Opus 4.7。
3.5 Flash最大亮點是大幅提升開發代理人模型的能力，它是Gemini 3.5系列第一個推出的版本，Google並預告正在內部測試及使用旗艦版3.5 Pro，預定下個月問世。

3.5 Flash最大亮點是大幅提升開發代理人模型的能力，它是Gemini 3.5系列第一個推出的版本，Google並預告正在內部測試及使用旗艦版3.5 Pro，預定下個月問世。

articles.title: Ivanti修補裝置管理平臺EPM高風險漏洞
articles.summary: 資安廠商Ivanti針對裝置管理平臺Ivanti Endpoint Manager（EPM）發布5月例行安全性更新，這次一共修補3項資安漏洞CVE-2026-8109、CVE-2026-8110、CVE-2026-8111，一旦成功被利用，可能導致洩露資訊、提升權限，或是遠端執行任意程式碼（RCE），該公司發布2024 SU6版更新予以修補。
articles.title_zh: Ivanti修補裝置管理平臺EPM高風險漏洞

articles.title: 博通修補VMware Fusion高風險漏洞
articles.summary: 5月14日博通（Broadcom）發布資安公告，執行在macOS電腦的個人端虛擬化軟體VMware Fusion存在權限提升漏洞CVE-2026-41702，此為SETUID二進位檔運作因檢查時間及使用時間不一致（TOCTOU）造成的弱點，攻擊者在取得非管理員使用者權限的情況下，可用來將權限升級為root，CVSS風險評為7.8分，為高風險等級，影響25H2版的VMware Fusion，博通已發布26H

articles.title: Ryzen 7 5800X3D AM4 10th Anniversary Edition surfaces online for $310 — return of iconic gaming CPU for budget builders seems imminent
articles.summary: Indian retailer lists AMD's Ryzen 7 5800X3D AM4 10th Anniversary Edition processor for $310.
articles.title_zh: Ryzen 7 5800X3D AM4 10週年紀念版現身網路，售價$310——標誌性遊戲CPU對預算玩家的回歸似乎迫在眉睫
articles.summary_zh: 印度零售商以$310的價格列出AMD的Ryzen 7 5800X3D AM4 10週年紀念版處理器。

articles.title: Team Group agrees to $1.1 million DRAM settlement in another false advertising lawsuit — claimed advertised memory speeds required BIOS tweaks and overclocking settings
articles.summary: Team Group denies all wrongdoing but has agreed to settle the lawsuit involving advertised RAM performance and overclocking-related settings.
articles.title_zh: Team Group同意以110萬美元和解虛假廣告訴訟——聲稱廣告記憶體速度需要BIOS調整和超頻設定
articles.summary_zh: Team Group否認所有不當行為，但已同意和解涉及廣告RAM效能和超頻相關設定的訴訟。

articles.title: Get a 2TB Western Digital Black SN7100 SSD for only $299.99 — $200 savings drives snappy PCIe 4.0 M.2 SSD down to a more reasonable price point.
articles.summary: Newegg slashes $200 off the 2TB WD Black SN7100 dropping this fast PCIe 4.0 SSD to $299.99 - strong PS5 and PC performance plus lower power draw make it one of the best DRAM-less drives at this price
articles.title_zh: 西部資料 Black SN7100 2TB SSD僅需$299.99——節省$200將高速PCIe 4.0 M.2 SSD降至更合理價位
articles.summary_zh: Newegg削價$200，將2TB WD Black SN7100這款快速PCIe 4.0 SSD降至$299.99，其出色的PS5和PC效能以及較低功耗使其成為該價位最佳的無DRAM固態硬碟之一。

articles.title: Samsung and SK Hynix employees are reportedly abandoning overseas training programs to nab up to $400,000 performance bonuses — online dating grades rise as female members 'seeking out SK hynix employees'
articles.summary: Samsung and SK Hynix employees are reportedly considering terminating overseas training programs to be eligible for performance bonuses as AI-driven semiconductor profits fuel record bonus projections worth hundreds of millions of won.
articles.title_zh: 三星和SK Hynix員工據報正放棄海外培訓計劃以獲得高達$400,000績效獎金——線上約會平台女性會員'積極尋找SK Hynix員工'
articles.summary_zh: 三星和SK Hynix員工據報正考慮終止海外培訓計劃以獲得績效獎金資格，因為AI驅動的半導體利潤推動創紀錄的獎金預測，規模達數億韓元。

articles.title: Russia's Sberbank wants Chinese chips for its GigaChat AI in the face of Western sanctions — faces a long wait behind ByteDance and Alibaba
articles.summary: CEO German Gref didn’t specify which Chinese chips Sberbank is interested in, but the most likely candidate is Huawei's Ascend 950 family.
articles.title_zh: 俄羅斯Sberbank在面臨西方制裁之際尋求中國晶片用於其GigaChat AI——在ByteDance和Alibaba之後面臨漫長等待
articles.summary_zh: CEO German Gref未具體說明Sberbank對哪些中國晶片感興趣，但最可能的候選是華為的Ascend 950系列。

articles.title: HyperX FlipCast Review: For the gamer-podcaster
articles.summary: The HyperX FlipCast is an end-address professional-quality microphone with both USB-C and XLR connectivity and tons of on-mic controls. It looks and sounds good, but is it worth the $230 price tag?
articles.title_zh: HyperX FlipCast評測：為玩家-播客設計
articles.summary_zh: HyperX FlipCast是一款具有USB-C和XLR連接及豐富機上控制的專業級麥克風，外觀和音質都不錯，但$230的價格標籤值得嗎？

articles.title: Asus ZenScreen Duo OLED (MQ149CD) Review: An impressive, book-style dual-screen portable monitor
articles.summary: Dual OLED screens are hard to ignore in the portable monitor segment for mobile warriors.
articles.title_zh: Asus ZenScreen Duo OLED (MQ149CD) 評測：令人印象深刻的書籍式雙屏便攜式螢幕
articles.summary_zh: 雙OLED螢幕在便攜式螢幕市場中對行動工作者來說難以忽視。

articles.title: Intel kicks off development on next-decade 10A and 7A process technologies — 14A node remains on track for critical October PDK release
articles.summary: Intel says its 14A process technology is on track for high-volume manufacturing in 2029, 10A and 7A to follow in the 2030s.
articles.title_zh: Intel啟動下一個十年10A和7A製程技術開發——14A節點保持在軌道上以備關鍵10月PDK發布
articles.summary_zh: Intel表示其14A製程技術按計畫在2029年實現大規模製造，10A和7A將在2030年代推出。

articles.title: China banned Nvidia 5090D V2 while CEO Jensen Huang was in town, report claims — move comes as Beijing pushes its AI tech companies to use homegrown chips
articles.summary: The RTX 5090D V2 GPU Nvidia specifically built for China to comply with U.S. export controls just received the ban hammer from Beijing. Although this GPU is primarily designed for gaming and 3D animation, it's also powerful enough that many AI developers also use it.
articles.title_zh: 據報中國在CEO Jensen Huang到訪期間禁止Nvidia 5090D V2——此舉適逢北京推動其AI科技公司使用國產晶片
articles.summary_zh: RTX 5090D V2 GPU是Nvidia專為中國量身打造以符合美國出口管制的產品，剛剛遭到北京的禁令。儘管該GPU主要用於遊戲和3D動畫，但其強大的效能也使許多AI開發者使用它。

articles.title: Grab the RX 9070 XT for just $504, $95 below its MSRP, in this Newegg combo deal with the 9850X3D — epic discount on high spec AMD parts for a 4K gaming PC saves you nearly $200 in total
articles.summary: This epic Newegg combo deal brings together the AMD Ryzen 7 9850X3D with an ASRock-made AMD Radeon RX 9070 XT for just $978.99, a deal that makes the effective cost of this GPU just $504, almost $100 off its MSRP.
articles.title_zh: 僅需$504即可獲得RX 9070 XT，比MSRP低$95，此Newegg組合交易與9850X3D配套——高端AMD零件的史詩級折扣為4K遊戲PC節省近$200
articles.summary_zh: 此Newegg組合交易將AMD Ryzen 7 9850X3D與ASRock製造的AMD Radeon RX 9070 XT結合，僅需$978.99，使該GPU的實際成本僅為$504，較MSRP便宜近$100。

articles.title: Hacker group hits 3,800 internal GitHub repositories via poisoned developer plugin — TeamPCP claims source code theft and attempts $50,000 sale, employee installed malicious VS Code extension
articles.summary: GitHub has confirmed a breach involving roughly 3,800 internal repositories after an employee device was compromised through a malicious VS Code extension. The TeamPCP hacker group claims it stole internal source code and attempted to sell the data for at least $50,000.
articles.title_zh: 駭客組織通過污染開發者外掛程式攻擊3,800個GitHub內部儲存庫——TeamPCP聲稱竊取原始碼並嘗試以$50,000出售，員工安裝了惡意VS Code擴充功能
articles.summary_zh: GitHub確認在員工裝置通過惡意VS Code擴充功能遭到入侵後發生洩露，涉及約3,800個內部儲存庫。TeamPCP駭客組織聲稱竊取了內部原始碼並嘗試以至少$50,000的價格出售該數據。

articles.title: $300 slashed from Apple's M4 MacBook Air with 24GB of RAM — get a premium laptop for just $1,099
articles.summary: Apple's MacBook Air M5 and M4 laptops both take a price cut in Best Buy's Memorial Day sale.
articles.title_zh: Apple M4 MacBook Air (24GB RAM) 降價$300——購買高端筆電僅需$1,099
articles.summary_zh: Apple的MacBook Air M5和M4筆電在Best Buy的陣亡將士紀念日銷售中都獲得降價。

articles.title: Intel CEO Lip-Bu Tan stamps out chip bugs with aggressive new quality standards, says major validation errors can result in termination — 'B0, you keep your job. Anything above that, you are fired'
articles.summary: Lip-Bu Tan wants Intel to radically improve its chip development discipline and achieve production readiness with A0 silicon revision.
articles.title_zh: Intel CEO Lip-Bu Tan以激進新品質標準消除晶片漏洞，表示重大驗證錯誤可導致終止——'B0，你保住工作。超過那個等級，你被開除'
articles.summary_zh: Lip-Bu Tan希望Intel根本改善晶片開發紀律，並以A0晶片修訂版實現生產就緒。

articles.title: You can save up to 72% in HP's Memorial Day sale — grab your next gaming PC, laptop, monitor, or peripheral for less
articles.summary: Memorial Day HP deals to sink your teeth into. Up to 72% discounts on HP products.
articles.title_zh: HP陣亡將士紀念日銷售最多省$300——購買下一台遊戲PC、筆電、螢幕或周邊配件享優惠
articles.summary_zh: 值得期待的陣亡將士紀念日HP交易，HP產品最多享72%折扣。

articles.title: Laser-driven spintronic memory device switches 1,000 times faster than DRAM —non-volatile device switches in 40 picoseconds while generating almost no heat
articles.summary: Researchers at the University of Tokyo demonstrated a non-volatile Mn₃Sn magnetic switching device capable of flipping bits in just 40 picoseconds while generating minimal heat, potentially paving the way for lower-power AI hardware and memory systems.
articles.title_zh: 雷射驅動自旋電子記憶體裝置切換速度比DRAM快1,000倍——非揮發性裝置在40皮秒內切換同時幾乎不產生熱量
articles.summary_zh: 東京大學研究人員演示了一種非揮發性Mn₃Sn磁性切換裝置，能在僅40皮秒內翻轉位元同時產生最少熱量，有望為低功耗AI硬體和記憶體系統鋪平道路。

articles.title: Score up to $129 off a new Secretlab gaming chair or desk ahead of the Memorial Day weekend — bundles and sales galore on a whole range of upgrades for your setup, with stackable coupon codes that knock up to $100 extra off for big orders
articles.summary: You can save up to $129 on a new gaming chair or desk in this Secretlab Memorial Day Sale, with huge discounts on accessories, too.
articles.title_zh: 陣亡將士紀念日週末前購買Secretlab遊戲椅或書桌最多省$129——一系列周邊產品有大幅折扣，可堆疊優惠券代碼大訂單額外優惠$100
articles.summary_zh: 在Secretlab陣亡將士紀念日銷售中，購買遊戲椅或書桌最多可省$129，周邊產品也有大幅折扣。

articles.title: Lisa Su meets China's vice premier during China visit — AMD CEO pledges deeper investment days after Trump-Xi summit
articles.summary: AMD CEO Lisa Su met with Chinese Vice Premier He Lifeng at the Great Hall of the People in Beijing on Monday, pledging further investment and expanded operations in what she calls "the world’s most dynamic AI ecosystem."
articles.title_zh: Lisa Su在中國訪問期間會見中國副總理——AMD CEO在Trump-Xi峰會後數日承諾深化投資

articles.title: Options Grow For Standardizing Data Movement And Sharing Resources
articles.summary: Semiconductor Engineering sat down to discuss memory interfaces, interconnects, and memory access scaling with Madhumita Sanyal, senior director of technical product management at Synopsys ; Swadesh Choudhary, senior principal engineer at Intel; Siamak Tavallaei, senior principal engineer at Samsung SSI; and Mohsen Asad, senior director of technology at Credo. What follows are excerpts of a discussion at the IMAPS Memory Summit in Santa Clara, California. L-R: Synopsys’ Sanyal; Intel’s Choudhary; Credo’s Asad; and Samsung’s Tavallaei SE: In the real world, data movement is messier than the interconnect standards would suggest. Not all data moves at the same speed, there are multiple channels, and all channels are not created equal. And nothing ages equally over time

articles.title: Blog Review: May 20
articles.summary: Cadence’s Siddh Virani demonstrates how to import and integrate foreign language logic into PSS on both Target and Solve platforms, opening possibilities for code reuse and cross-language collaboration. Synopsys’ Sumit Vishwakarma finds that AI model training and inference workloads are forcing the industry to rethink not only how much compute fits in a rack, but how servers are architected from end to end, resulting in a complete transformation of computing infrastructure. Siemens’ Emily Yan compares HBM3e and HBM4 , identifies key design challenges sich as signal integrity and thermal management, and considers the projected timeframes for adoption. Intel Foundry’s Ravi V. Mahajan argues that while heterogeneous integration is emerging as the most practical path to

articles.title: Jamf names former CTO Beth Tschida as CEO to lead its new AI push
articles.summary: Jamf has just announced the appointment of Beth Tschida as its new Chief Executive Officer, effective immediately. Tschida is a familiar face at the company, having served as Chief Technology Officer since 2022. She succeeds John Strosahl, who guided the company through its transition from public to private ownership after Francisco Partners acquired it back in January 2026. With this announcement, Tschida becomes the first woman to lead Jamf in its 20+ year history. more…

articles.title: Android cloning Apple’s Handoff feature is cheeky but a good thing
articles.summary: The appeal of Apple devices has always been a mix of hardware quality and software features, with the wider ecosystem absolutely key. Effectively, Apple devices gain value as soon as you have more than one of them. Handoff is a perfect example. You can begin working on a document on your Mac, seamlessly continue on your iPad, and then make some last-minute changes on your iPhone. Google is now cloning this feature in Android 17 … more…

articles.title: Gemini’s new limits are already frustrating users
articles.summary: TL;DR Gemini users are annoyed with the new usage limits. They’re complaining that they’re hitting the new limits much faster now. Several users have reportedly canceled their subscriptions. Google just changed up its subscription AI offerings, and while it may have tried to make users focus on the new reduced pricing for its AI Ultra plan , the company also sneakily nerfed the limits for people subscribed to Gemini AI Pro and Ultra. Now users are feeling the impact of those changes first-hand, and they are not happy. The Gemini subreddit is full of people dunking on Google for the suddenly tighter limits. One user said that they’re canceling their Pro subscription after exhausting 50% of their usage limit with a simple five prompt back-and-forth with the AI (via PiunikaWeb ).

articles.title: Google is breaking its ‘free for life’ promise to some G Suite legacy users
articles.summary: Credit: Dhruv Bhutani / Android Authority TL;DR Google is said to be flagging some long-time G Suite Legacy accounts for “commercial use” and pushing users toward paid Workspace plans. Affected users say they could lose access to Gmail, Drive, Calendar, and Meet unless they appeal or upgrade within 45 days. Several customers say Google’s appeal process is unclear, with some appeals allegedly rejected automatically or without explanation. If you thought your grandfathered Google account was safe, you might want to double-check your inbox. Google is apparently pressuring long-time G Suite Legacy users to pay for business subscriptions , saying they’re using their free accounts for commercial purposes. articles.title: The Galaxy Z Fold 8 may miss out on S26 Ultra’s best features
articles.summary: Credit: Prakhar Khanna / Android Authority TL;DR Samsung’s Galaxy Z Fold 8 leak points to a surprising downgrade strategy centered around making the foldable thinner. The Fold 8 series may reportedly lose S Pen support and Samsung’s new Galaxy S26 Ultra privacy screen technology. Samsung’s 2026 foldable strategy is starting to look a lot more complicated and potentially divisive. The latest Galaxy Z Fold 8 leak suggests Samsung is ditching some of the premium features buyers expect from a device that costs nearly $2,000. Tipster Ice Universe claims on X that the Galaxy Z Fold 8 series will ship without S Pen support and without Samsung’s new privacy screen technology that debuted on the Galaxy S26 Ultra .

articles.title: This phone brand is launching a magnetic rear screen, and I wish Samsung and Google copied it
articles.summary: TL;DR Honor is reportedly launching a magnetic rear display for its upcoming phone. It can be used as a selfie mirror, and also as a remote camera button. It’s not expected to be very pricey, either. Magnetic rear displays for smartphones are getting quite popular, and some phones like the Xiaomi 17 Ultra and the Nothing Phone 4a Pro are even coming with rear displays built-in. However, the freedom of having a magnetic screen that simply snaps on and off your phone is, in my opinion, better. And that’s why I’m really jealous of the fact that Honor is launching a magnetic rear display for its upcoming smartphone. Don’t want to miss the best from Android Authority ?

Mobile phone bills, including those for T-Mobile subscribers , are consistently going up. Thankfully, there are always some offers that let you get some respite. articles.title: Here is our best look yet at the computing puck powering XREAL’s Android XR glasses
articles.summary: Credit: Google / XREAL TL;DR At the Android XR booth at Google I/O 2026, Google is showing off the XREAL Project Aura Android XR glasses. This is the first good look at the computing puck, which features a touchpad for navigation and supports DisplayPort In to project external device screens directly into the spatial workspace. The glasses feature electrochromic glass for software- or hardware-adjustable opacity. Google showed off its new Android XR glasses with Samsung , but that’s not the only Android XR news we’re getting this week. Google is also allowing longer previews and photography of the XREAL Project Aura at the Android XR booth at Google I/O 2026, and we finally get a good look at the computing puck and connected experiences. Dieter Bohn, Director of Product Operations at Googl

Google is also allowing longer previews and photography of the XREAL Project Aura at the Android XR booth at Google I/O 2026, and we finally get a good look at the computing puck and connected experiences. Dieter Bohn, Director of Product Operations at Googl

This means you can upload your virtual memory cards and save states to the cloud. The update also brings Google’s Oboe Sound Engine for low-latency audio. Duckstation is the best PS1 emulator on Android right now, but ePSXe is another great choice. The latter emulator has been around for well over a decade now, and it just got a notable update. Don’t want to miss the best from Android Authority ?

articles.title: This Kindle competitor just shrunk one of its biggest advantages
articles.summary: TL;DR Kobo has raised prices again on e-readers like the Libra Colour and Clara lineup. The devices now cost up to $40 more than they did at launch after multiple price hikes since 2024. Shoppers are increasingly questioning whether Kobo still offers the same value advantage over Kindle. Rakuten Kobo’s e-readers are some of the easiest recommendations for readers frustrated with Amazon’s increasingly restrictive Kindle ecosystem. A big reason for that recommendation has always been value. Unfortunately, though, that gap is shrinking. As spotted by users on the eReaders Forum , Kobo has raised prices on several e-readers again, including the Kobo Libra Colour and Kobo Clara Colour. The increases vary by region, but in the US, some devices now cost dramatically more than they did at launch.

It also recommended that users migrate their data to another app. Microsoft is shutting down its SMS app and has started sending notifications to its users informing them of the same. The app was hugely popular back in the day for its SMS categories and filtering features. However, it had not received any updates since September 2024, so the shutdown isn’t exactly a surprise.
