articles.title: Android 17’s Live Updates will be a boon for workout and travel apps
articles.summary: Credit: Mishaal Rahman / Android Authority TL;DR Android 17 is introducing a new “Metric Style” notification template for Live Updates, expanding the feature to health, fitness, timers, and travel apps. The template allows apps to showcase up to three distinct data points simultaneously across the Always-On Display, lock screen, and status bar. The notification layout dynamically changes based on the device’s state, shifting between glanceable values, an expanded side-by-side view, and a single-line collapsed view. Android 16 introduced progress-centric notifications, a new type of notification that displayed progress and milestones in ride-sharing and food-delivery apps. Android 16 QPR1 for Pixels upgraded this to the full Live Updates experience by adding them to the Always On Display, t
articles.title_zh: Android 17 的 Live Updates 將成為健身和旅遊應用的福音

articles.title: Android boss reveals the unsurprising reason Google Glass ended up in the tech graveyard
articles.summary: Credit: Lanh Nguyen / Android Authority TL;DR A Google executive recently admitted that Google Glass failed because it lacked a fashion appeal. Sameer Samat, president of the Android ecosystem, said, “fashion comes first,” and that it’s more important than technology. Google has now partnered with eyewear brands Warby Parker and Gentle Monster to make its upcoming smart glasses look trendy. At I/O 2026, Google gave us a preview of how its upcoming Android XR glasses could make our lives easier. For anyone who’s followed Google’s announcement for slightly more than a decade, the announcement may have summoned a sense of nostalgia. That’s because Google first previewed its smart glass solution at I/O 13 years ago. Even if you don’t remember, Android’s chief does, and they’re grateful for wha
articles.title_zh: Android 負責人揭露 Google Glass 最終淪為科技墓地的意外原因
articles.summary_zh: Google 高管承認 Google Glass 失敗是因為缺乏時尚魅力。Android 生態系統總裁 Sameer Samat 表示「時尚優先」比技術更重要。

articles.title: Google One just got an upgrade I’ve wanted for years, and I couldn’t be happier
articles.summary: Google One is having a moment right now. Over the last few months, Google has updated its Google One AI Pro and AI Ultra plans to include two new bundled subscriptions. After Google Home Premium was added in November, Google Health Premium joined the party just this month. These two changes have dramatically improved the usefulness and value proposition of Google One, and at Google I/O 2026, Google announced another big change — one that’s potentially even more impactful.
articles.title_zh: Google One 獲得我期待多年的升級，我欣喜若狂
articles.summary_zh: Google One 最近新增了 Google One AI Pro 和 AI Ultra 計畫，包含兩個新綑綁訂閱。Google Home Premium 在 11 月新增，Google Health Premium 本月也加入。

articles.title: Buying an Android phone is no longer enough — Google wants you to subscribe too
articles.summary: Credit: Joe Maring / Android Authority Scan through this year’s Google I/O announcements, and you’ll find two defining, interlocking themes. AI now permeates nearly every Google product; Search, Shopping, and even YouTube have all received the Gemini treatment to varying degrees. Likewise, Android’s Gemini app is set for an overhaul with a new “Neural Expressive” UI, Spark, and Daily Brief — making it an even more powerful hub for Google’s latest AI features right on your phone. However, if you want to actually make use of Docs Live, Gemini Omni Flash, Gemini Spark , Information Agents, Google Pics , or the new Daily Brief, you’re going to have to hand over cash every month for a Gemini subscription. That’s right, most of the “exciting” new features Google has to talk about will require a
articles.title_zh: 購買 Android 手機已不夠 — Google 希望你也訂閱
articles.summary_zh: 在今年的 Google I/O 公告中，AI 現已融入幾乎所有 Google 產品。Google 同時希望使用者訂閱更多服務。

articles.title: Android 17 cracks down on shady apps that play surprise background audio
articles.summary: TL;DR Android 17 is introducing stricter rules for apps that play audio in the background. Apps will need to be actively in use or use approved background services to control audio playback. The change aims to reduce random, unexpected audio playback, which can lead to potentially embarrassing moments for users. Google is changing how background audio works in Android 17 to help stop those annoying moments when random audio suddenly starts playing from your phone. Don’t want to miss the best from Android Authority ?
articles.title_zh: Android 17 嚴厲打擊播放突發背景音訊的可疑應用
articles.summary_zh: Android 17 為播放背景音訊的應用引入了更嚴格的規則。應用需要被積極使用或使用核准的背景服務來控制音訊播放。

articles.title: One of Gemini’s newest features is already ruined, and it’s all Google’s fault
articles.summary: During its I/O opening keynote yesterday, Google talked a lot about various new Gemini features. There’s Gemini Spark , Gemini Omni , Gemini 3.5 Flash , and so much more. However, out of all the Gemini things announced, the one that caught my attention the most is Gemini Daily Brief . Daily Brief is being pitched as a “personalized morning digest that’s designed to be your first stop every day.” You can access Daily Brief right in the Gemini app, where it’ll remind you of upcoming flights, calendar appointments, recent purchases, and more.
articles.title_zh: Gemini 最新功能之一已經毀了，全是 Google 的錯
articles.summary_zh: Google 在 I/O 主題演講中宣布了多項新 Gemini 功能，其中 Gemini Daily Brief 引起最多關注。

The 1000X The Collexion headphones are a special launch celebrating the 10th anniversary of Sony’s 1000X headphone line. Don’t want to miss the best from Android Authority ?

articles.title: Tired of fake smartphone photos? This Android camera app might be the fix
articles.summary: TL;DR VWFNDR + MBL is a new camera app that captures unprocessed Bayer RAW DNG (and JPEG) files to skip modern computational photography pipelines and preserve real-world imperfections. The app utilizes the open C2PA standard to provide a tamper-evident record, proving the image was taken by a real camera and not generated or altered by AI. Available for free on Android 10 or later, the app currently only supports the primary rear camera and serves as the software foundation for future camera hardware from VWFNDR. Smartphone camera apps from different brands used to have distinct identities, but over the years, we’ve all converged on a single design. While this is great for users who rely on muscle memory, it takes some of the fun out of photography. Add to that the over-reliance on AI and
articles.title_zh: 厭倦假手機照片？這個 Android 相機應用可能是解決方案
articles.summary_zh: VWFNDR + MBL 是一款新相機應用，可擷取未經處理的 Bayer RAW DNG 檔案，跳過現代計算攝影管道並保留真實世界的不完美。

articles.title: Media apps in Android Auto are about to get a big design boost
articles.summary: TL;DR Google is bringing new features to media apps on Android Auto. Developers will be able to use new components, expanded headers, spotlight sections, and more to offer a better app experience. Apps like Spotify, YouTube Music, Gaana, and others are already incorporating the new features. At the Android Show: I/O Edition 2026 last week, Google shared details about Gemini Intelligence and Googlebooks and also announced a massive makeover for Android Auto , including Material 3 Expressive design, widgets, and video apps. Now, alongside the I/O announcements, the company has shared more details about the updates coming to media apps on Android Auto in a new developer blog post . Don’t want to miss the best from Android Authority ?

articles.title: Android 17 takes a big step toward Apple-style ecosystem continuity with ‘Continue On’
articles.summary: Credit: Joe Maring / Android Authority TL;DR Google has introduced a new Android 17 feature called “Continue On” that lets users move apps between Android devices and continue where they left off. The feature will initially support phone-to-tablet handoffs, with app suggestions appearing directly in the tablet taskbar. Continue On is part of Google’s broader push to improve Android’s cross-device ecosystem and better compete with Apple’s continuity features. Google made a ton of new announcements at I/O 2026, but Gemini and its AI ambitions clearly overshadowed Android . Still, on the sidelines of I/O, Google announced an extremely useful and important new feature coming to Android 17 .
articles.title_zh: Android 17 透過「Continue On」功能向 Apple 風格的生態系統連續性邁出大步
articles.summary_zh: Google 在 Android 17 中推出「Continue On」功能，允許使用者在 Android 設備間移動應用並從中斷處繼續。該功能初期將支援手機到平板的交接。

articles.title: Google’s excellent offline AI app just got even better with three big features
articles.summary: Credit: Andy Walker / Android Authority TL;DR Google has brought several new features to its AI Edge Gallery app. The on-device AI app now offers chat history and notification reminders. The app also supports the MCP feature, so it can interact with other apps and services like Maps and email. Google’s AI Edge Gallery app allows you to easily download and run AI models on-device, making it handy if you want a more private and versatile AI experience. However, the search giant is bringing even more improvements to the app as part of its I/O developer conference. For starters, Google announced that AI Edge Gallery on Android now supports the Model Context Protocol (MCP) feature. MCP is an open-source protocol that offers a standardized way for on-device AI models to interact with other apps
articles.title_zh: Google 優秀的離線 AI 應用透過三項大功能變得更好

articles.title: Google will soon let you vibe code Android apps on the fly
articles.summary: TL;DR Google is bringing its AI Studio to mobiles soon. The app will allow users to create, iterate, test, and publish apps directly from their smartphones. You can pre-register for it right now on Android, with iOS pre-orders coming soon as well. App development has very quickly shifted from being a manual task undertaken in Android Studio to vibe coding and AI-assisted development workflows. You may have already tried your hand at vibe coding XR experiences or creating Android apps using Google AI Studio, and the company wants to make the process even more accessible on the go. Don’t want to miss the best from Android Authority ?

articles.summary_zh: Google 即將在手機上推出 AI Studio。該應用將允許使用者直接從智慧手機建立、反覆運算、測試和發佈應用。

articles.title: AT&T will introduce a new fee for prepaid customers in June
articles.summary: If you are an AT&T customer using a prepaid plan, you need to know this – the carrier is introducing an “AT&T Administrative & Regulatory Cost Recovery Fee” to the tune of $2.63 per service payment. This change will come into effect on June 22 of this year. You can follow the Source link below to see a detailed explanation of what this fee is supposed to cover. AT&T’s postpaid accounts already had an Administrative & Regulatory Cost Recovery Fee, which is $3.99 per line per month, so the prepaid plans are cheaper. That postpaid fee was $3.49 per line until December of last year, by the...

Now at a HarmonyOS conference in China, the company just came out and revealed that the MatePad Pro Max is powered by the Kirin T93 Pro SoC. The phone is configurable with up to 16GB LPDDR5X RAM and 1TB UFS 4.1 storage. The front is dominated by a 6.82-inch 8T LTPO AMOLED...

articles.title: Android 17's 'Continue On' feature will let you move tasks between devices
articles.summary: Google made quite a few announcements on the first day of Google I/O 2026, and one of them is "Continue On," which is an Android 17 feature that app developers can implement to provide cross-device continuity for their users. In Google's own words, "Continue On enables users to start an Android app on one Android device and then transition to another device in their Android ecosystem, continuing the user journey they started." In simpler words, if you are working on a document in the Google Docs app on your Android smartphone, with Continue On, you continue the same work on an Android...

articles.summary: Apple has announced that the Apple Sports app, introduced in 2024, is now available to download from the App Store in more than 170 countries and regions, following its expansion into over 90 new markets. Apple is also making it easier for fans to follow the FIFA World Cup 2026, kicking off on June 11, by allowing them to explore tournament groupings and customize their scoreboards just by following the entire tournament or their favorite national teams in the Apple Sports app. When you follow a team in the Apple Sports app, Live Activities are enabled and shown on your iPhone's Lock...

Wear OS 7 introduces Widgets, which Google says are designed to be flexible and dynamic. These widgets will be available in 2x1 and 2x2 layouts, similar to the widget formats...

The first available model in the Gemini 3.5 family is Gemini 3.5 Flash. This is now out for everyone via the Gemini app and it's also available in AI Mode in Google Search. This model "delivers intelligence that rivals large flagship models on multiple dimensions, at the speeds you have come to expect from the Flash series", Google says. It's the strongest agentic and coding Gemini model, outperforming even Gemini 3.1 Pro...

articles.title: Why six AI labs built the same product for knowledge workers in four months
articles.summary: Six vendors built the same agent in four months. Anthropic shipped Claude Cowork on January 12, gave it Claude Code’s agentic harness, and watched investors knock $285 billion off the SaaS index three weeks later when the open-source plugin pack landed on GitHub. Perplexity launched Computer on February 25, an orchestrator that routes work across nineteen models with Claude Opus as the reasoner. Microsoft announced Copilot Cowork on March 9, built on Claude through its deepening partnership with Anthropic, with Frontier preview rolling out in late March. OpenAI rebuilt the Codex desktop app on April 16 with computer use, ninety plugins, persistent memory, and scheduled automations, and Greg Brockman called it a general agent harness that happens to write software. Google launched Gem
articles.title_zh: 為什麼六個AI實驗室在四個月內開發了相同的知識工作者產品
articles.summary_zh: 六家廠商在四個月內開發了相同的agent。Anthropic在1月12日推出Claude Cowork，採用Claude Code的agent架構，三週後開源插件包在GitHub上線時，投資者從SaaS指數中撤出2,850億美元。Perplexity推出了Computer o

articles.title: LLMs were trained on an inaccessible web — AudioEye data shows AI is still building one
articles.summary: Picture making a lasagna with noodles, peanut butter, and pears. You’ve got the base right, but the ingredients don’t quite add up to a palatable meal. It’s how  Mike Paciello  explains the accessibility gaps that surface when developers use LLM-based methods to code web pages and apps. “With AI-based tools, the gap that exists today is structural, not incidental. The root of the challenge is that LLMs have been trained on an inaccessible Web,” Paciello, Chief Accessibility Officer at  AudioEye , tells  The New Stack . To extend the lasagna metaphor, the problems are baked in. “With AI-based tools, the gap that exists today is structural, not incidental. The root of the challenge is that LLMs have been trained on an inaccessible Web.&
articles.title_zh: LLMs在無法訪問的網絡上訓練——AudioEye數據顯示AI仍在構建一個
articles.summary_zh: AudioEye表示，開發者使用基於LLM的方法編寫Web代碼時，會出現可訪問性的差距。這就像用麵條、花生醬和梨製作千層麵——基礎有對，但材料組合不夠理想。

articles.title: Cursor bets on cheaper coding with Composer 2.5 and Kimi K2.5
articles.summary: Cursor announced this week that Composer 2.5 is available in Cursor, only two months after the release of Composer 2 , which beat Opus 4.6 on coding benchmarks at a fraction of the price. It’s another burst in the company’s streak of model releases, marking the fourth Composer in the last seven months.  Cursor says the latest iteration brings major upgrades to long-running coding tasks, complex instruction-following, and training efficiency, as well as behavioral improvements in “communication style and effort calibration,” but time will tell whether benchmark gains translate into real-world improvements.  A cheaper contender in the coding model line-up Like its predecessor, Composer 2.5 is built on Moonshot Kimi K2.5 , an open-source native multimodal age
articles.title_zh: Cursor以Composer 2.5和Kimi K2.5的更低價格下注
articles.summary_zh: Cursor本週宣布Composer 2.5可用，距離Composer 2發布僅兩個月。Composer 2在編碼基準測試中超過Opus 4.6，但價格僅為其一小部分，標誌著公司過去三個月內第四次發布Composer。

articles.title: At Google I/O 2026, Antigravity gets a new job description
articles.summary: Six months after its initial launch, Google is moving Antigravity beyond its origins as a coding environment. The company is repositioning it as a platform for developing and managing teams of autonomous AI agents — and backing the expansion with a new desktop application, a CLI , an SDK , and enterprise cloud integration . “We are expanding Antigravity beyond a coding environment and turning it into a platform to develop and manage teams of autonomous AI agents,” said Koray Kavukcuoglu , CTO of Google DeepMind and Chief AI Architect at Google, during a press briefing this week ahead of Google I/O 2026 . The company says millions of developers are already building with the platform. “We are expanding Antigravity beyond a coding environment and turning it into a plat
articles.title_zh: 在Google I/O 2026，Antigravity獲得新的職位描述

articles.title: The AI Boom Is Making Warsh’s Bond-Market Bind Even Worse
articles.summary: To judge by a key bond-market signal, the AI boom is only worsening Kevin Warsh’s inflation problem.
articles.title_zh: AI 熱潮使 Warsh 的債券市場困境更加惡化
articles.summary_zh: 根據一項關鍵的債券市場信號判斷，AI 熱潮只會加劇 Kevin Warsh 的通脹問題。

articles.title: SpaceX Expected to Make IPO Filing Public Today
articles.summary: SpaceX is expected to file paperwork for its massive initial public offering today. Goldman Sachs and Morgan Stanley are the leading banks. The target valuation is now above $2 trillion. Bloomberg's Bailey Lipschultz has more on what to expect. (Source: Bloomberg)
articles.title_zh: SpaceX 預計今日將 IPO 申請公開提交
articles.summary_zh: SpaceX 預計今天提交其大規模首次公開募股的文件，Goldman Sachs 和 Morgan Stanley 是主要承銷銀行，目標估值現已超過 2 兆美元。

articles.title: What to Watch for In Nvidia Earnings After the Bell
articles.summary: Nvidia, the world's most valuable company, reports first-quarter earnings after the bell on Wednesday. Wall Street is waiting to get a read on the state of the artificial intelligence economy. Investors will also look for guidance on its long-term sales forecast and trying to sell AI processors in China. Bloomberg's Ed Ludlow reports on "Bloomberg Open Interest." (Source: Bloomberg)
articles.title_zh: Nvidia 盤後財報需關注的重點
articles.summary_zh: 全球市值最高的公司 Nvidia 將在週三盤後公佈第一季度財報，華爾街想了解人工智能經濟的狀況。

articles.title: Liontrust Focused on Nvidia Suppliers Ahead of Earnings
articles.summary: Clare Pleydell-Bouverie, Liontrust Fund manager, talks about why she is focused on what Nvidia is buying from suppliers ahead of their earnings report. She speaks on "Bloomberg The Opening Trade." (Source: Bloomberg)
articles.title_zh: Liontrust 在 Nvidia 財報前關注芯片供應商
articles.summary_zh: Liontrust 基金經理 Clare Pleydell-Bouverie 談論在 Nvidia 財報前她為什麼關注 Nvidia 從供應商購買的產品。

articles.title: Security Firm Thwarting Nation-State Hackers Valued at $1 Billion
articles.summary: Socket, a cybersecurity startup that sells technology to help safeguard open-source code against hackers, has raised a new round of funding that values the company at $1 billion.
articles.title_zh: 阻擊民族國家駭客的安全公司估值達 10 億美元
articles.summary_zh: 網絡安全新創公司 Socket 提供技術幫助保護開源代碼免受駭客攻擊，已獲得新一輪融資，估值達 10 億美元。

articles.title: Commerzbank CEO Says AI Will Cut €350 Million in Costs by 2030
articles.summary: Commerzbank AG Chief Executive Officer Bettina Orlopp said artificial intelligence will lead to cost savings worth about €350 million ($406 million) in a few years.
articles.title_zh: Commerzbank CEO 表示 AI 將在 2030 年前削減 3.5 億歐元成本
articles.summary_zh: Commerzbank AG 首席執行官 Bettina Orlopp 表示，人工智能將在幾年內帶來約 3.5 億歐元（4.06 億美元）的成本節省。

articles.title: Using Extreme Engineering to Flood-Proof Coastal Cities
articles.summary: On this episode of Bloomberg Primer, we explore how global capitals from Tokyo to Jakarta and Nairobi are grappling with increasingly dangerous weather.
articles.title_zh: 利用極端工程為沿海城市防洪
articles.summary_zh: 在這期 Bloomberg Primer 中，我們探討全球首都如從東京到雅加達和奈羅比如何應對日益危險的天氣。

articles.title: Barclays CEO Says AI Is Having a 'Creeping Impact'
articles.summary: Barclays CEO CS Venkatakrishnan discusses the use of artificial intelligence in the banking industry, saying the technology is having a "creeping" impact on the UK lender. "We are seeing things getting on the margin a little more efficient in certain parts," he says. "Fundamental impact — I think it's coming, but I don't see it yet," he adds during a conversation with Bloomberg's Francine Lacqua at the Global Markets and Banking Summit 2026 in London. (Source: Bloomberg)
articles.title_zh: 巴克萊 CEO 表示 AI 正在產生「逐漸滲透的影響」
articles.summary_zh: 巴克萊 CEO CS Venkatakrishnan 討論人工智能在銀行業中的使用，表示該技術對英國貸款方產生「逐漸滲透的」影響。

articles.title: French Companies Bid for €10 Billion Europe AI Gigafactory
articles.summary: A consortium of European companies will bid on a €10 billion ($11.6 billion) project to build a major data center campus in France as part of the continent’s effort to boost artificial intelligence infrastructure.
articles.title_zh: 法國公司競標 100 億歐元歐洲 AI 超級工廠
articles.summary_zh: 一個歐洲公司聯盟將競標一個 100 億歐元（116 億美元）的項目，以在法國建設主要數據中心園區，作為歐洲提升人工智能基礎設施的努力的一部分。

articles.title: Andreessen-Backed AI Search Startup Exa Valued at $2.2 Billion
articles.summary: Exa Labs Inc., a San Francisco-based startup that wants to build a search engine tailor-made for the age of artificial intelligence, raised $250 million at a $2.2 billion valuation in a round led by venture firm Andreessen Horowitz.
articles.title_zh: Andreessen 支持的 AI 搜尋引擎新創公司 Exa 估值達 22 億美元
articles.summary_zh: 舊金山新創公司 Exa Labs Inc. 想建立一個為人工智能時代量身定制的搜尋引擎，以 22 億美元估值完成 2.5 億美元融資，由創投公司 Andreessen Horowitz 領投。

articles.title: Elliott Ramps Up Its AI Efforts With Key Hire From Blackstone
articles.summary: Elliott Investment Management hired former Blackstone Inc. executive Teresa Sweeney to run the roughly $80 billion hedge fund firm’s global research and data science group.
articles.title_zh: Elliott 從 Blackstone 引進關鍵人才來擴大 AI 努力
articles.summary_zh: Elliott Investment Management 聘請前 Blackstone Inc. 高管 Teresa Sweeney 領導該對沖基金公司約 800 億美元的全球研究和數據科學團隊。

articles.title: What to Look for When SpaceX’s IPO Filing Is Made Public
articles.summary: SpaceX’s paperwork for its initial public offering could be made public as soon as Wednesday, offering a rare glimpse into the finances of the Elon Musk-led enterprise before its planned record-setting debut.
articles.title_zh: SpaceX IPO 申請公開時需關注的事項
articles.summary_zh: SpaceX 的首次公開募股文件最快可能在週三公開，提供難得一見的 Elon Musk 領導企業財務狀況，為其計畫中的創紀錄首秀做準備。

articles.title: Video Adoption Propels Global Podcast Sales to Record High of $9.2 Billion
articles.summary: According to a new report, 73% of the podcast industry’s growth last year in the US came from video-related revenue
articles.title_zh: 視頻採用推動全球播客銷售創新高至 92 億美元
articles.summary_zh: 根據一份新報告，去年美國播客行業增長的 73% 來自與視頻相關的收入。

articles.title: Major Chatbots Found Unreliable on Elections, News Topics
articles.summary: Startup’s survey shows chatbots generally provide inaccurate answers when asked about news
articles.title_zh: 主要聊天機器人在選舉和新聞話題上被發現不可靠
articles.summary_zh: 新創公司的調查顯示，聊天機器人在被問及新聞相關問題時通常會提供不準確的答案。

articles.title: Chatbots Struggle With News Accuracy and Sourcing Ahead of Midterms
articles.summary: Four major artificial intelligence chatbots — OpenAI’s ChatGPT, Alphabet Inc.’s Google Gemini, Anthropic’s Claude and xAI’s Grok — are struggling to fairly and accurately answer questions about elections and geopolitics, according to a new study from Forum AI.
articles.title_zh: 聊天機器人在中期選舉前面臨新聞準確性和來源問題
articles.summary_zh: 根據Forum AI的最新研究，OpenAI的ChatGPT、Alphabet Inc.的Google Gemini、Anthropic的Claude和xAI的Grok等四個主要AI聊天機器人在回答有關選舉和地緣政治問題時，準確性和公正性不足。

articles.title: AI’s Promises Are Starting to Materialize – With a Human Cost
articles.summary: Markets are being built around it, powered by it, and priced because of it. But AI comes with a hefty human toll.
articles.title_zh: AI的承諾正在實現——但伴隨人力成本
articles.summary_zh: 市場正在以AI為基礎進行構建、運營和定價，但AI帶來了高昂的人力代價。

articles.title: Advocacy Groups Seek FTC Probe Into Roblox for Kid Spending
articles.summary: The National Center on Sexual Exploitation and Fairplay, two advocacy groups focused on child safety, are asking the US Federal Trade Commission to investigate Roblox Corp.’s game mechanics, which they claim coerce kids into spending unreasonable amounts of money on the platform.
articles.title_zh: 倡導團體要求美國聯邦貿易委員會調查Roblox兒童消費問題
articles.summary_zh: 專注於兒童安全的兩個倡導團體——全國性虐待防止中心和Fairplay要求美國聯邦貿易委員會調查Roblox Corp.的遊戲機制，聲稱其強制兒童在平台上進行不合理的支出。

articles.title: Meta Starts 8,000 Global Job Cuts in AI Efficiency Push
articles.summary: Meta is alerting thousands of employees that they’re being laid off, part of a previously announced restructuring aimed at reducing costs while the company invests heavily in artificial intelligence. The company began notifying workers around the world Wednesday morning, starting with employees across Asia, who got the note at 4 a.m. Singapore time. US-based staff are also expected to receive word during their morning, according to an internal memo. Bloomberg's Tom Mackenzie reports. (Source: Bloomberg)
articles.title_zh: Meta在AI效率推動中啟動全球8,000人員削減
articles.summary_zh: Meta正在通知數千名員工其被裁員，這是先前宣布的重組計劃的一部分，旨在降低成本同時公司加大對人工智能的投資。

articles.title: Intesa, ABN Amro Join Stablecoin Push to Blunt Dollar Dominance
articles.summary: A consortium of European banks seeking to launch a euro-denominated stablecoin has added 25 lenders to its ranks, speeding up efforts to build a viable alternative to dollar-denominated digital money.
articles.title_zh: 意大利聯合聖保羅銀行和荷蘭銀行加入穩定幣計畫以削弱美元主導地位
articles.summary_zh: 尋求推出歐元計價穩定幣的歐洲銀行聯盟已新增25家放貸機構，加快建立美元數字貨幣可行替代品的努力。

articles.title: Court Adviser Says Bolloré Controls Vivendi in Shareholder Spat
articles.summary: Billionaire Vincent Bolloré controlled Vivendi SE before a split of the media conglomerate in 2024, a Paris advocate general is set to say, a positive step for minority holders who want the billionaire to buy them out.
articles.title_zh: 法院顧問稱Bolloré控制Vivendi股東糾紛
articles.summary_zh: 億萬富翁Vincent Bolloré在2024年媒體集團Vivendi分拆前控制該公司，巴黎檢察長準備作此表示，這對希望該億萬富翁收購其股份的少數股東是利好消息。

articles.title: Tinder Is Betting Gen Z Daters Would Rather Be Offline
articles.summary: The dating app’s turnaround bets on live events, group dating and an AI-heavy redesign.
articles.title_zh: Tinder押注Z世代約會者更願意離線
articles.summary_zh: 該約會應用的業務轉型押注於實體活動、群組約會和AI密集的重新設計。

articles.title: Samsung Braces For Disruption After Labor Talks Collapse | The China Show 5/20/2026
articles.summary: “Bloomberg: The China Show” is your definitive source for news and analysis on the world's second-biggest economy. From politics and policy to tech and trends, Yvonne Man and Avril Hong give global investors unique insight, delivering in-depth discussions with the newsmakers who matter. (Source: Bloomberg)
articles.title_zh: 三星在勞資談判破裂後為中斷做準備 | 中國秀 5/20/2026

articles.title: Man jailed for posting Trump meme wins $835,000 settlement
articles.summary: Larry Bushart, a retired Tennessee cop who was jailed for 37 days for posting a Trump meme on Facebook , won an $835,000 settlement Wednesday after suing the county and sheriff that he said jailed him in order to censor him. In a press release , Bushart's legal team at the Foundation for Individual Rights and Expression (FIRE) confirmed that Bushart agreed to dismiss his lawsuit in exchange for the "substantial settlement." "I am pleased my First Amendment rights have been vindicated," Bushart said. "The people’s freedom to participate in civil discourse is crucial to a healthy democracy. I am looking forward to moving on and spending time with my family." Read full article Comments
articles.title_zh: 因發佈特朗普梗圖被監禁的男子獲得835,000美元和解
articles.summary_zh: 退休田納西州警察Larry Bushart因在Facebook上發佈特朗普梗圖被監禁37天，在起訴該縣和警長後於週三獲得835,000美元和解，聲稱其被監禁以進行審查。

articles.title: Russia's plan to advertise on rockets and spacecraft takes off
articles.summary: It's difficult to know the true state of the Russian economy, both because the country's financial reporting is sparse and because official figures are unreliable. But things probably aren't great. This week, Sweden's minister of foreign affairs, Maria Malmer Stenergard, shared her country's assessment that the Russian economy has likely contracted over the last five years amid the war in Ukraine. Inflation is also high, and international sanctions have cost Russia $450 billion since the onset of the war in February 2022. Russia's economy is currently smaller than that of Texas, Stenergard said. By most measures, then, the economy is not in tip-top shape. Moreover, the war is draining a large amount of the country's financial resources, with defense spending reaching a post-Soviet record o
articles.title_zh: 俄羅斯在火箭和航天器上投放廣告的計劃起飛

articles.title: Yearslong fight over users' right to tweak smart TV software heads to trial
articles.summary: For years, owners of Vizio smart TVs have had little control over the software running on their sets—software that can track viewing habits, push ads, and generally shape the experience of using the device. The Software Freedom Conservancy (SFC), a US nonprofit that promotes and provides legal support for free and open source software projects, isn't happy about that—so much so that it has spent eight years trying to force the release of the complete source code for Vizio's Linux-based smart TV operating system. Now, after numerous delays since the SFC filed suit in 2021, a California jury will decide in August whether Vizio must provide that code in executable form to SFC and any Vizio TV owner who wants it. Read full article Comments
articles.title_zh: 多年來用戶調整智能電視軟體的權利爭議進入審判
articles.summary_zh: 多年來，Vizio智能電視所有者對其設備上運行的軟體幾乎沒有控制權，該軟體可以追蹤收看習慣、推送廣告並塑造設備使用體驗。軟體自由保護組織(SFC)是推廣和提供法律支持的美國非營利組織。

articles.title: China banned RTX 5090D V2 while Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang was visiting
articles.summary: Beijing banned an Nvidia gaming chip while the company’s chief executive, Jensen Huang, was visiting China with Donald Trump last week, the latest salvo in the superpowers’ battle to dominate AI. The chip was added to a list of banned goods at China’s customs checkpoints last Friday, according to a copy of the document seen by the FT and two people with knowledge of the matter. The move highlights Beijing’s determination to keep out Nvidia’s chips, especially the degraded versions made to comply with US export controls. The Chinese government wants to support domestic chipmakers such as Huawei and Cambricon as they catch up to their US rivals. Read full article Comments
articles.title_zh: Nvidia CEO黃仁勳訪華期間中國禁止RTX 5090D V2
articles.summary_zh: 北京在Nvidia執行長黃仁勳上週與唐納德·特朗普訪華期間禁止該公司的一款遊戲芯片，這是超級大國爭奪AI主導地位鬥爭的最新一步。

articles.title: The Internet can't stop watching Figure AI's humanoid robots handling packages
articles.summary: The robotics startup Figure AI has been livestreaming humanoid robots placing thousands of packages onto a conveyor belt for nearly a week—a spectacle that included a robot competing against a human intern at one point. The promotional robot demo has become a viral sensation among tech enthusiasts, spurring YouTube commenters to name the robots and the company to rapidly roll out related robot merchandise in response. Users on X have described the livestream in glowing terms, such as “the greatest product demo since Steve Jobs’ ‘one more thing.’” But despite such sentiments, it’s worth bearing in mind that even the most impressive robot demos represent narrow windows for understanding real-world robot capabilities. Figure’s event began on May 13 as a planned eight-hour robot demonstration
articles.title_zh: 網際網路對Figure AI人形機器人處理包裹的展示欲罷不能
articles.summary_zh: 機器人初創公司Figure AI已直播人形機器人將數千個包裹放在傳送帶上近一週，這場景曾包括機器人與人類實習生比賽。這場促銷機器人演示在科技愛好者中引發了病毒式熱潮。

articles.title: Moose-proof and megacasting: Ars drives the new Volvo EX60
articles.summary: Volvo provided flights from Austin, Texas to Barcelona, Spain and accommodation so Ars could visit drive the EX60. Ars does not accept paid editorial content. BARCELONA, Spain—Volvo unveiled its new all-electric EX60 in January with a slew of distinctions. The EX60 is the first model on the company's all-EV SPA3 platform, a scalable base upon which Volvo plans to build a range of other vehicles. With up to 400 miles (643 km) of range and faster charging than any other Volvo vehicle, this EV carries a lot of hopes and dreams. Volvo says it completely changed how it builds cars for the EX60, refining every stage of production. Part of the building process is called megacasting, a technique that converts molten aluminum into one lightweight piece. The model also boasts 800 V charging and cell
articles.title_zh: 防駝鹿和大型鑄造：Ars試駕新款Volvo EX60

articles.title: Meta平臺占今年1至4月詐騙案件高達8成以上，政府要求強化演算法從源頭攔截詐騙訊息
articles.summary:
行政院打擊詐欺指揮中心(簡稱打詐指揮中心)指出，Meta旗下Facebook、Instagram與Threads已成臺灣詐騙主要來源管道，占比超過8成，造成財損超過13億元。政府要求平臺必須從演算法與偵測機制著手，改採「源頭阻斷」策略，否則不排除修法加重平臺責任與罰則。
打詐指揮中心今天(5/20)公布最新統計，2026年1月至4月期間，臺灣詐騙案件中，為Meta所屬社群平臺涉及詐騙案件數為1.4萬件，占比高達84.31%，包含Facebook、Instagram與Threads等相關平臺造成的財損占比更達86.2%，金額約13.6億元。
articles.title_zh: Meta平臺占今年1至4月詐騙案件高達8成以上，政府要求強化演算法從源頭攔截詐騙訊息

打詐指揮中心今天(5/20)公布最新統計，2026年1月至4月期間，臺灣詐騙案件中，為Meta所屬社群平臺涉及詐騙案件數為1.4萬件，占比高達84.31%，包含Facebook、Instagram與Threads等相關平臺造成的財損占比更達86.2%，金額約13.6億元。

articles.title: GitLab發布安全更新，修補可能導致執行任意JavaScript程式碼、拒絕服務攻擊的多項重大漏洞
articles.summary: 全球主要DevOps開發平臺之一的GitLab，近日發布更新，修補Community Edition（CE）與Enterprise Edition（EE）版的25項漏洞，包含多項重大漏洞，可能導致駭客得以執行任意JavaScript程式碼，或是發動拒絕服務攻擊。GitLab建議採用自行管理（self-managed）版本的用戶，儘速升級到已修補的18.11.3、18.10.6與18.9.7等版本，雲端版GitLab.com服務則已完成更新。
articles.title_zh: GitLab發布安全更新，修補可能導致執行任意JavaScript程式碼、拒絕服務攻擊的多項重大漏洞

articles.title: 面對AI漏洞風暴！資安署籲企業重視基本功，並強調資安實務已從「預防被打」轉向「迅速復原」
articles.summary: 面對先進AI模型引發的資安威脅，已成為各國政府高度關切的重點。例如，美、英、加監理機關與銀行高層，陸續傳出對於相關風險的研討，英國國家網路安全中心（NCSC）亦特別提醒企業，必須先完善內部的漏洞管理機制再嘗試使用AI尋找漏洞。
articles.title_zh: 面對AI漏洞風暴！資安署籲企業重視基本功，並強調資安實務已從「預防被打」轉向「迅速復原」

articles.title: 【資安日報】5月20日，CISA驚傳暴露AWS GovCloud金鑰與內部系統憑證
articles.summary: CISA於GitHub暴露AWS GovCloud金鑰、內部系統憑證
articles.title_zh: 【資安日報】5月20日，CISA驚傳暴露AWS GovCloud金鑰與內部系統憑證

articles.title: 沙箱函式庫SandboxJS修補CVSS滿分重大漏洞，未更新可能導致執行任意程式碼
articles.summary: 在5月初，開源JavaScript沙箱函式庫SandboxJS專案發布資安公告，揭露重大漏洞CVE-2026-43898，攻擊者可藉此突破沙箱限制，直接在主機端執行任意JavaScript程式碼。這個漏洞影響0.9.5版以前的SandboxJS，已在0.9.6版中修補，用戶應儘速升級到新版本。
articles.title_zh: 沙箱函式庫SandboxJS修補CVSS滿分重大漏洞，未更新可能導致執行任意程式碼

articles.title: 微軟預覽伺服器Linux發行版Azure Linux 4.0
articles.summary: 微軟本週在北美開源高峰會（Open Source Summit North America）2026上公佈執行於Azure VM上的Azure Linux 4.0預覽版，成為該公司首個執行在雲端伺服器版Linux OS。

articles.title: 執法行動Operation Ramz查封53臺惡意軟體及網釣伺服器
articles.summary: 5月18日國際刑警組織（Interpol）宣布，他們在中東及北非13國執法機關的合作之下，於2025年10月至2026年2月28日展開Operation Ramz行動，針對網路釣魚與惡意軟體活動進行調查，並瓦解惡意基礎設施，共逮捕201名嫌犯，另確認有382人涉及從事網路犯罪活動，查扣53臺伺服器，受害者達到3,867人，這也是國際刑警組織首度在中東及北非地區主導的大規模執法行動。

articles.title: 微軟破獲惡意軟體簽章服務平臺Fox Tempest
articles.summary: 5月19日微軟宣布成功瓦解自2025年開始運作的惡意軟體簽章服務（Malware-Signing-as-a-Service，MSaaS）平臺，經營者是以經濟利益為動機的駭客團體Fox Tempest，他們濫用微軟的Artifact Signing系統為惡意程式簽章，使其能暫時躲過資安系統的偵測。

articles.title: OpenAI與Dell合作讓Codex支援企業混合雲與本地環境
articles.summary: OpenAI與Dell宣布合作，將讓Codex連接Dell AI Data Platform，並探索與Dell AI Factory介接的方式，使企業能在混合雲與本地環境中使用Codex。該合作重點是讓Codex更接近企業既有的資料、系統與工作流程，支援大型組織在所需的控管條件下導入AI代理。

articles.title: 國內低軌衛星通訊服務將再添生力軍，遠傳宣布成為Amazon Leo在臺授權經銷商
articles.summary:
國內低軌衛星通訊市場將再添新的生力軍。遠傳電信宣布與已和Amazon的旗下低軌衛星網路服務Amazon Leo 簽署合作協議，成為其在臺灣的授權經銷商，將高速低軌衛星服務引進臺灣市場。遠傳表示，未來將鎖定政府及企業客戶，提供高韌性通訊服務，最高下載速度可達 1Gbps。
這代表電信業者在低軌衛星的布局競爭進一步升溫。在此之前，中華電信一直是最積極引進衛星通訊服務的業者，包括引進OneWeb的低軌衛星服務，以及高軌、中軌衛星，並多次對外強調布局海、地、星、空多種異質網路，以強化通訊韌性。遠傳電信引進 Amazon Leo，將使臺灣在通訊韌性上的選擇更加多元。

articles.title: Google更新AI Studio，可直接生成原生Android App
articles.summary: Google週二（5/19）宣布，旗下AI開發平臺Google AI Studio新增原生Android App生成功能，開發者只需輸入文字提示詞，即可在幾分鐘內產生完整Android應用程式，不需額外安裝軟體、下載軟體開發套件（SDK）或設定函式庫，進一步降低行動應用程式開發門檻。

articles.title: 微軟修改Edge瀏覽器密碼管理機制，避免開機即載入明文密碼
articles.summary: 微軟近日宣布修改Microsoft Edge瀏覽器的密碼管理機制，未來瀏覽器啟動時，將不再將所有已儲存密碼以明文（cleartext）載入記憶體，而是改為僅在用戶需要時再進行處理，以降低由此產生的風險。
